full_text:
ABDULRAHMAN MAHMOUD ALI MOHAMED
Computer Engineer | AI Solutions Architect | Multipotentialite Tech & Branding Strategist
Location: Helwan, Cairo, Egypt
Phone: +20 1159192735 / 01023385827
Emails: abdelrahmanmahmoud1269@gmail.com |
abdelrahmanmahmoud359@gmail.com
LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/abdulrahman-mahmoud-

PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
A visionary Computer Engineer and Natural-born Leader driven by a competitive #1 mentality. A
Social Introvert who combines deep analytical focus with high-level Social Intelligence. Expert in 7
Programming Languages, Odoo ERP, and High-Performance Sales. Pioneer Technical Content
Creator with over a decade of experience tracking global platform algorithms (from Musical.ly to
TikTok). Known for 100% Data Accuracy, high-speed execution, and an insatiable passion for
learning from world-class success stories.

CORE COMPETENCIES
• Engineering & IT: Proficiency in 7 Programming Languages, Expert
Algorithm Design (Ranked #1), Odoo ERP Implementation, Linux System
Administration (Kali/Ubuntu), Penetration Testing.
• AI & Automation: AI Automation (n8n), Prompt Engineering, Meticulous Data
Cleaning, AI-Powered Visual Storytelling.
• Sales & Communication: High-Ticket Sales, Professional Telesales, Call
Center Excellence, Consumer Psychology, Strategic Negotiation.
• Digital Finance & Marketing: Cryptocurrency (Bitcoin), Strategic Media
Buying, Viral Trend Forecasting, Global Market Tracking.
• Management: Natural Leadership, HR Management, Dropshipping
Operations, International Tourism.

PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE

Real Estate & Tourism Investment Consultant | The Address Investments | Feb
2025 – Present
• Managing premium portfolios for HNW clients using Sales Psychology and
Telesales mastery.
• Ensuring 100% Data Accuracy in CRM management and high-stakes financial
reporting.
AI & ERP Solutions Strategist (Freelance) | Upwork | June 2025 – Present
• Architecting end-to-end AI automation workflows and managing Odoo ERP
systems for global clients.
• Optimizing customer acquisition through Media Buying and data-driven
psychological triggers.
Computer Engineer (Front-end) | Atlantis Company | Jan 2023 – Present
• Engineering scalable web interfaces with a focus on Psychological UI/UX and
secure data architecture.

NOTABLE IMPACT & ACHIEVEMENTS
• Pioneer Tech Influencer: First Egyptian creator to technically dissect social media
algorithms, leveraging deep-rooted insights since the Musical.ly era.
• Multi-Language Developer: Mastered 7 programming languages, enabling versatile
architecture across different platforms and OS.
• High-Speed Execution: Professional Ultra-Fast Typing Speed with an obsession for detail
and data integrity.

EDUCATION & CERTIFICATIONS
• B.Sc. in Management Information Systems (MIS) | Cairo, Egypt.
• Certified Algorithm Specialist (Ranked #1) | NTI & ITI.
• Certified Cybersecurity Fundamentals | National Telecommunication Institute (NTI).
• AI for Digital Marketing | Information Technology Institute (ITI).
• HR Management Certification | Professional Course.

TECHNICAL SKILLS & LANGUAGES
• Software & Tools: Odoo, Linux (Kali), Meta Ads Manager, Crypto Wallets, Shopify, n8n,
Power BI.
• Personal Traits: Avid Reader, Strategic Thinker, Global Success Tracker.
• Languages: Arabic (Native), English (Excellent Reading/Listening | Intermediate
Speaking).

Summary
Motivated Computer Science student and Back-End Developer with experience building APIs, managing

problem-solving skills, allowing effective contribution across the full development cycle. Committed to writing
clean, efficient, and reliable code.
Education
Ain Shams University - Faculty of Computer and Information Sciences,
Bachelor's in Information Systems
• GPA: 3.0/4.0
• Coursework: Algorithms Analysis & Design, Object oriented programming,
Database Management System, Data structures, Operating System, System
Analysis & Design, Software Engineering, Web Development, Design Patterns,
Computer Networks
2022 – 2026
Cairo , Egypt
Skills
Languages
C, C++, C#, Java, Java Script, Type Script, Python,
SQL, HTML, CSS
Technical Concepts
• RESTful API Design
• Database Design & Normalization
• Authentication & Authorization
• MVC Architecture
• Clean Code Principles
• Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC)
• Design Patterns
• SOLID Principles
Version Control
Git, GitHub
Technologies
• C# / .NET Core
• ASP.NET Web API
• Entity Framework
• SQL / Sqlite
• LINQ
• JWT Authentication
• Postman
• Visual Studio / VS Code
Projects
Clinic Appointment System
• A web-based application that allows patients to register and book appointments
with doctors. Doctors can manage their schedules, and administrators oversee
clinic operations, including doctor availability and patient records. The system
ensures appointment conflict prevention, status tracking, and supports billing.
• Tools: ASP.NET Core Web API, Entity Framework Core, Microsoft SQL Server, Visual
Studio, JWT Authentication, RESTful API
12/2025 – Present

BookCommerce
• A full-stack e-commerce web application for buying books online. Includes
product catalog, shopping cart, order management, secure user authentication
using ASP.NET Core Identity, and implementation using N-Tier Architecture.
• Tools: ASP.NET Core MVC, Entity Framework Core, Microsoft SQL Server, Visual
Studio.
11/2025 – Present
FOS Operating System
• Developed as a project for the Operating Systems course, focusing on OS
fundamentals . Implemented memory management, process scheduling, system
calls, and synchronization techniques.
• Tools: C.
10/2024 – 01/2025
Courses
.NET Core MVC - [E-commerce], Udemy
Complete ASP.NET Core MVC (.NET 8) & Razor Course – Udemy Learned the
fundamentals and project structure of ASP.NET Core MVC and Razor. Gained hands-
on experience building two full projects with Entity Framework Core (Code-First),
ASP.NET Core Identity with role management, authentication & authorization,
custom Tag Helpers, View Components, sessions, TempData, and Bootstrap v5.
Implemented Stripe payments, email notifications, repository pattern, and
deployed projects to Microsoft Azure.
11/2025 – Present
Mastering ASP.NET Core: Concepts to Production-Ready APIs,
Essam AbdelNabi (Metigator)
Completed a structured course covering the full ASP.NET Core API development
lifecycle, from fundamentals to advanced concepts. Gained hands-on experience in
building production-ready APIs, implementing authentication, authorization, and
API security, and applying best practices for scalable, secure, and maintainable
backend systems. The course included step-by-step exercises and practical projects
to strengthen both understanding and real-world application.
10/2025 – Present

full_text:
Abdelrahman Amro Zakzouk
01013693331 | Abdulrahman.zakzouk@yahoo.com | linkedin.com/in/abdelrahman-zakzouk-863a44253 | github.com/abdelrahman1903
Education
German University in Cairo
Cairo, Egypt
Bachelor of Computer science and Engineering
Oct. 2021 – July 2026
• Bachelor Thesis (A+): AI-powered multimodal assistant for cultural interpretation and tourism.
• Publication (AC 2025): Smart Tourism Meets AI: A Multimodal Assistant for Exploratory Cultural Engagement. Peer-reviewed
short paper accepted at the International Conference on Applied Computing, based on my A+ bachelor thesis.
Projects
Fantasy Premier League Graph-RAG Assistant | Python, Neo4j, LangChain, LLMs
3 December 2025 – 15 December 2025
• Built a Graph-RAG FPL assistant combining Neo4j knowledge graphs with LLMs for grounded player insights.
• Implemented deterministic intent routing to select Cypher queries, RAG-based embedding retrieval, or clarification.
• Designed reusable Cypher templates for player stats, fixtures, and season-level analysis.
• Integrated RAG embedding pipelines for player similarity and recommendation using numerical and text-based features.
• Evaluated multiple LLMs (Gemini, LLaMA, DeepSeek, Mistral) across accuracy, latency, and response quality.
ZakAI: Personal AI Assistant | Python, Node.js, FastAPI, langchain, Flutter, Next.js
July 2025 – October 2025
• Built a production-style multimodal AI assistant with Python and Node.js backends and Flutter/Next.js frontends.
• Implemented LLM tool-calling, structured outputs (Pydantic), dynamic routing, and robust logging for observability and debugging.
• Integrated STT (Whisper), TTS (ElevenLabs), vision (Qwen3-VL-2B), and image generation (Stable Diffusion).
• Designed multi-user architecture with JWT authentication, isolated sessions, and persistent chat history.
• Connected external tools (Gmail OAuth2, Weather APIs) through function calling and agent-style orchestration.
AI Tourist Assistant for Cultural Interpretation — Thesis Project (Awarded an A+ Grade)
March 2025 – June 2025
Python, React, FastAPI, Google Gemini Flash 2.5
• Designed an AI-powered cultural assistant using RAG, tool calling, and structured LLM outputs.
• Built a router-based backend supporting Cultural Q&A, Retrieval-Augmented Generation, and Tool Execution.
• Implemented document ingestion and semantic search using Docling, LanceDB, and Nomic embeddings.
• Added geographic reasoning for nearby place recommendations and contextual responses.
• Integrated Whisper STT for real-time voice interaction.
CariGo: Trip Planner Website | React, Node.js, MongoDB, Express.js, Postman
October 2024 – December 2024
• Developed a MERN stack trip planner platform with JWT authentication for secure access.
• Built REST APIs for itineraries, bookings, and user preferences with Node.js and Express.js.
• Implemented payments system with Stripe integration, including refunds and points redemption.
• Integrated a currency conversion API to display trip prices in users’ preferred currency.
• Automated booking updates and offers via email notifications using Nodemailer.
Database Engine | Java, Serialization, B+ Trees
March 2024 – May 2024
• Implemented table storage using serialized files with B+ tree indices for fast retrieval.
• Developed CRUD operations, schema management, and a custom query function replicating SQL SELECT for data retrieval.
• Optimized memory with on-demand page loading for efficient disk usage.
Database System for Advising Students | SQL, ASP.NET,
September 2023 – January 2024
• Designed a relational database schema for an academic advising system.
• Implemented stored procedures, views, and triggers for business logic and consistency.
• Built an ASP.NET app supporting course scheduling, graduation planning, and payments.
Extracurricular Activities
Henkel ThinkTech Hackathon — 3rd Place | Python, Next
16 October 2025 – 18 October 2025

tech-driven solution that secured 3rd place among 11 competing teams.

full_text:
Ahmed Abdelaziz Elshahawy
Backend Developer | .NET Developer
Egypt, Cairo | 01555048280 | AhmedSahahawy59@gmail.com | www.linkedin.com/in/ahmed-
shahawy-2980301a6 | Leet Code :- https://leetcode.com/u/leeter5/ | GitHub :-
https://github.com/AhmedSheeha | Military Service : Exempted
Summary
Junior Backend Developer | .NET Specialist | Problem Solver
Enthusiastic and detail-oriented, with expertise in .NET, OOP, and design patterns. Skilled in
problem-solving and creating scalable solutions, I’m a quick-learning, self-motivated team
player committed to growth in software development.
Skills
Programming Languages:- C++, JavaScript, and C#.
Backend Technologies :- LINQ, Entity Framework, Restfull API, .NET Core, MVC, Identity, Jwt,
and SignalR. Databases:- MS SQL server.
Frontend Technologies:- HTML, CSS, and Bootstrap.
Software Skills:- Object Oriented Programming, Algorithms, Data Structures, Design Patterns,
SOLID, Problem Solving, and Clean Code.
Tools :- Git & GitHub.
Soft Skills:- Communication, Teamwork and Collaboration, Critical Thinking and Interpersonal
Intelligence.
Projects
Store API(GitHub:- https://github.com/AhmedSheeha/Store):-
•
Ecommerce API Enables Customers To make orders And even to Adjust it Later.
•
Allows the Admin to Add, remove, and Update the products under different Categories.
As there is Authorization layer to restrict normal users.
•
Tools:- ASP.NET Core API– SQL Server – Entity Frame work – LINQ – JWT - Microsoft
Identity .
•
Design Patterns:- Generic Repository – Specific Repository – Unite Of Work –
Dependency Injection – DTOs – CQRS – Clean Architecture - Mediator.
Clinic Management system API(Github:- https://github.com/AhmedSheeha/clinic):-
•
A system To manage A clink Efficiently, allows user or patient to have an account and to
have his/her history with The Clinic.

•
allows the patient to view the Schedule for Each Doctor at the Clinic, and gives him the
Ability to create an appointment at any specific time the doctors are available.
•
allows doctor to create their schedule and when they are Available so the patients can
know.
•
Doctors can close the appointment and make Attendance then write the diagnosis in
the Patient History.
•
Tools:- ASP.NET Core API– SQL Server – Entity Frame work – LINQ – JWT - Microsoft
Identity .
•
Design Patterns:- Generic Repository – Specific Repository – Unite Of Work –
Dependency Injection – DTOs.

School Management API(github:- https://github.com/AhmedSheeha/School)
• School Application To Manage All the Affairs Related to the School Students , the
Teachers, and the Departments.
Library Management System(Github:- https://github.com/AhmedSheeha/Library-
System):-
•
Perfectly Manages The Library to add, delete, update and Borrow the borrow the books.
•
allows administrators to manage books in the Library.

Ahmed Elsayed
[Cairo, Egypt][+20 106-204-2584][a_elsayed_f@icloud.com][GitHub][LinkedIn]

Professional Summary
Backend Developer specialized in .NET, experienced in building scalable APIs and backend
systems using C#, ASP.NET Core, EF Core, and SQL Server. Strong problem-solver with clean
coding practices and a focus on performance, reliability, and delivering high-quality solutions.

Skills
.NET, ASP.NET Core, EF Core, C#, SQL Server, REST API development, LINQ, Clean Architecture.
Strong in OOP, Data Structures & Algorithms, Problem Solving, Agile.
Proficient with Git, Postman, and basic web technologies (HTML, CSS, JavaScript).

Professional Experience
Backend Developer – Off-shoreUp Remote Contract (USA) 3-month contract​
Developed a landing website and CRM system in a fully remote setup.
Backend Developer – Self-Employed
●​ Built and launched an e-commerce platform (“Commerca”) using .NET, including product
management, orders, payments, and admin dashboard.​

●​ Customized and deployed the system for multiple clients, handling full development,
delivery, and maintenance.

Educations & Certificates
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science from Faculty of Computer Science
Misr International University — 2020 - 2024 GPA: 3.1

Backend Web Development (.NET)
Route Learning 2024-2025
Completed a comprehensive backend development program covering C#, ASP.NET Core, EF
Core, SQL Server, and API development.

Extracurricular Activities
IT Member – MUN & Arab League (2022–2023): Built internal portals for attendance,
complaints, and HR interviews using PHP, HTML, CSS, JS, AJAX.
Project Manager – MUN & Arab League (2023–Present): Leading project planning and
team coordination.

full_text:
AHMED SALAH MANSOUR
Cairo, Egypt | 01111924496 | ahmedsalah66848@gmail.com | LinkedIn | GitHub
SUMMARY
Motivated Computer Science graduate specializing in Backend & AI Engineering with expertise in
scalable backend systems using Laravel, Spring Boot, and microservices. Skilled in database
optimization, AI/ML model deployment, and Docker-based environments. Strong knowledge in deep
learning, computer vision, and NLP architectures.
EDUCATION
BSc in Computer Science — Ain Shams University (09/2020 – 06/2025), Cairo, Egypt
Specialization: Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning
Graduation Project: Molecular Generation & Optimization using REINVENT + Quantum Computing
(A+)
TECHNICAL SKILLS
Backend Technologies: Laravel, Spring Boot, RESTful APIs, Microservices, Docker, Message Queue
(Redis, RabbitMQ).
Databases: MySQL (Schema Design & Optimization).
AI & Machine Learning: Python, TensorFlow, PyTorch, Scikit-learn, Keras, MLflow, DVC.
Deep Learning / CV / NLP: CNN, RNN, Transformers, YOLO, Mask R-CNN, ViT, DETR.
Frontend: HTML, CSS, JavaScript.
Version Control: Git, GitHub.
CI/CD & Deployment: Docker Compose.
Authentication & Security: JWT, OAuth2, API security (rate limiting, validation, encryption).
Caching & Optimization: Redis caching, API performance tuning, query optimization.
Testing: Unit Testing (PHPUnit / JUnit).
Problem Solving: Strong DSA understanding (advanced) • Specialist Problem Solver with 300+ solved
on Codeforces.
PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE
Dayra — Backend Intern (Jul 2022 – Oct 2022) — Hybrid
Worked on production-grade financial microservices including interest accrual calculations, invoicing
pipelines, and Egyptian Tax Authority integration. Implemented secure RESTful APIs with validation
layers, encryption, rate limiting, and structured error handling. Developed idempotent transaction
workflows using UUID keys, race-condition protections, and composite constraints to prevent
duplication. Built automated cron financial pipelines, retry mechanisms, circuit-breaker patterns,
dead-letter queue handling, and monitoring dashboards ensuring fault-tolerant backend performance.

PROJECTS
Molecular Generation & Optimization using REINVENT + Quantum Computing:
Developed an end-to-end molecular generation pipeline using a customized REINVENT model with
domain-specific scoring functions. Integrated quantum evaluation modules and delivered a complete
training, validation, and analysis workflow.
Customer Billing & Loan Service — Dayra:
Developed backend logic for billing and loan operations, designed optimized schemas, secured APIs,
and migrated processes into background pipelines using queues and scheduled jobs.
COURSES & ACHIEVEMENTS
• Internship Certification — Dayra (Backend Engineering)
• Backend Certification — Cybers (PHP, Laravel)
• Codeforces Specialist — Competitive Programming
• Certified Full Stack Developer (PHP, Laravel, MySQL)
• HackerRank: Software Engineer Intern, SQL, Python, Java
LANGUAGES
Arabic — Native
English — Fluent
SOFT SKILLS
Strong analytical and problem-solving mindset, effective communication, teamwork (Agile/Scrum),
adaptability.

full_text:
Almohanad Ahmed Shaaban
• +201062717061 • 6th of October, Giza, EG • almohanad.ahmed2026@gmail.com
• LinkedIn: Al-Mohanad Ahmed • GitHub: mohanad20-s
Flutter Developer

PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
Experienced Flutter Developer with a solid foundation in Dart and cross-platform mobile
development. Proven expertise in building high-performance, scalable applications using
Clean Architecture and SOLID principles. A proactive problem-solver with extensive
hands-on experience gained from ITI and DEPI intensive training, specializing in
responsive UI/UX, state management, and seamless API integration.

TECHNICAL EXPERIENCE & TRAINING
Flutter Development Intern | ITI (Information Technology Institute) Winter Training
| Jan 2026 – Feb 2026
•
Performance Optimization: Developed complex UIs with custom animations,
ensuring a consistent 60 FPS rendering speed and smooth user transitions.
•
Data Architecture: Integrated Hive and SQLite for local persistence, resulting in
a 40% increase in data retrieval speed and enabling robust offline functionality.
•
State Management & Lifecycle: Managed complex application states using
Bloc and Provider, reducing memory leaks by 15% through precise widget
lifecycle management.
•
Modular Programming: Applied OOD patterns (Singleton, Command) to build
reusable components, decreasing code redundancy by 25% across multiple
training projects.
Mobile Application Development (Flutter) Intern | DEPI | May 2024 – Nov 2024
•
Production-Ready Engineering: Engineered scalable Flutter applications,
optimizing widget trees to reduce initial app load time by 20%.
•
Backend Efficiency: Optimized data flow using Dio and RESTful APIs,
implementing advanced JSON parsing that reduced API response handling time
by 15%.
•
Scalable Authentication: Integrated secure Firebase Authentication and
Firestore, supporting real-time data sync for concurrent users with minimal
latency.

•
Agile Collaboration: Managed codebases via Git/GitHub in a team
environment, achieving 100% conflict-free integration through strategic branch
management.

TECHNICAL PROJECTS
Food Delivery Application | View on GitHub
•
Engineered a full-featured cross-platform app emphasizing Responsive Design to
ensure UI consistency across various screen sizes.
•
Implemented real-time UI updates and a customized Favorites system to
enhance user personalization and engagement.
•
Utilized Clean Architecture to ensure strict separation of concerns and high code
maintainability.
News & Weather Integration App (ITI Practice)
•
Optimized data fetching by consuming RESTful APIs using the Dio package for
real-time updates.
•
Applied analytical thinking to streamline user experience by handling complex
JSON parsing and robust error handling.

TECHNICAL SKILLS
•
Languages & Frameworks: Flutter, Dart.
•
Software Design: SOLID Principles, Clean Architecture, Design Patterns.
•
State Management: Provider, Bloc/Cubit, Stateful Widget Lifecycle.
•
Database & Backend: Firebase, REST APIs, Hive, SQLite, JSON Serialization.
•
Tools: Git, GitHub, Android Studio, VS Code, Postman.

EDUCATION
Bachelor of Computer Science | Thebes Academy, Egypt
Expected Graduation: June 2026

CORE COMPETENCIES
•
Technical Problem Solving: Strong debugging and troubleshooting capabilities in
complex Flutter environments.
•
Collaborative Development: Experienced in working within technical teams and
maintaining clear project documentation.
•
Continuous Learning: Rapidly adapting to new frameworks and evolving industry
best practices to deliver modern mobile solutions.

Bashar Abdel-Sattar El-Samahy
Systems Admin/DevOps
basharelsamahy7@gmail.com
+201093267362
El Husseiniya, Al-Sharqia
Bashar El-Samahy
Bashar-samahy
Bashar Abdel-Sattar El-Samahy
Profile
Systems Admin/DevOps proficient in managing Windows/Linux servers, cloud infrastructure, and automation solutions. Skilled in
cloud platforms, containerization, and CI/CD tools, with a strong focus on optimizing workflows, enhancing system reliability, and
enabling smooth deployments. A collaborative team player committed to contributing to scalable and efficient IT environments.
Experience & Internships
DevOps Instructor – (part-time)
09/2025 – Present | Dokki - Giza
Instant
A DevOps Instructor teaches students the core DevOps tools and practices, delivers hands-on labs, and guides learners in building
skills in automation, cloud, CI/CD, Linux, and containerization to prepare them for real industry workflows.
Technical Support Specialist – (full-time)
12/2024 – 2/2025 | Nasr City - Cairo
Telecom Egypt Company
responsible for diagnosing and troubleshooting software, hardware, and network issues to ensure smooth operation of telecom
services.
provide technical assistance to customers, configure systems, manage network setups, and follow up to resolve problems
efficiently, ensuring high customer satisfaction and service reliability.
Education
Systems Administration/DevOps Trainee 03/2025 – 07/2025
Information Technology Institute – ITI (Intensive Code Camps) Damanhur City, Al Beheira Governorate

Bachelor of Computers and Informatics.
09/2019 – 07/2023
Faculty of Computers and Informatics, Zagazig University
Zagazig City, Ash Sharqiyah Governorate
Grade: Good

Projects
Comprehensive User & Service Management on Windows Server
• Designed and deployed a multi-domain Windows Server infrastructure with Active Directory, DNS, FTP, and automated software
deployment, ensuring high availability and centralized management. Implemented group policies, backup solutions, and security
measures to optimize performance and safeguard network resources.
Comprehensive Enterprise Linux Deployment Project
• Designed and deployed a full enterprise Linux environment for a mid-sized company using Red Hat. Implemented secure user/group
management, LVM-based storage, access controls, SELinux, and automated backups. Configured internal web services, firewall
rules, SSH hardening, and recovery procedures as part of system administration tasks.
User Management System – Bash script
(GitHub)
• This Bash script provides a simple, menu-driven interface for Linux system administrators to manage user accounts and groups
efficiently. It allows adding, deleting, listing, and searching for users, changing passwords, and creating backups of user data.
Secure Web App on AWS (Terraform)
(GitHub)
• Designed and deployed a public proxy/private backend architecture on AWS using Terraform, enforcing security best practices.
Implemented multi-AZ VPC, ALB, Auto Scaling, and isolated RDS with fine-grained access controls. Achieved infrastructure-as-
code reproducibility with modular Terraform and remote state management.
• Key Stack: AWS (EC2, VPC, ALB, RDS, S3) | Terraform | Linux | SSH

Certificates
RHCSA - Red Hat Certified System Administrator
HCCDA-Tech Essentials (HWENDCTEDA897617)
AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner
HCCDP-Cloud Migration (HWENDCCCDP778800)

Technical Skills
Cloud Platforms
CI/CD Tools
AWS and Huawei Cloud
Jenkins and GitHub Actions
Containerization & Orchestration
Infrastructure as Code (IaC)
Docker, Kubernetes, OpenShift and Helm
Terraform and Ansible
Scripting & Programming
Version Control
Python, Bash, Data Structures and Algorithms
Git and GitHub.
Monitoring
Operating Systems
Prometheus, Grafana
Linux (Ubuntu, RedHat), Windows Server and VMware vSphere
Databases
Formatting
MySQL, PostgreSQL and MongoDB
YAML and JSON
Others
NGINX, Apache.
Languages
Arabic — Native/Bilingual
English — Proficient

Projects
It is composed of a client and server that communicate using sockets.
RAT Includes features such as keylogging, password stealing, screenshot, PowerShell execution, file transfer.
It uses multiple evasion techniques including multi-stage infection, encryption, runtime injection, obfuscation
to operate stealthily and avoid detection by security software and support persistence.
Effective tool for red teaming (Using C++) .
A³B RAT | Graduation Project (2023)
Load Balancer in Go Built Go-based load balancer with configurable routing strategies
(RoundRobin, WeightedRoundRobin) using YAML definitions for dynamic traffic distribution. (2025)
Automated CI/CD Pipeline for High-Availability Multi-Tier Application Deployed Jenkins CI/CD
pipeline with Maven, SonarQube, and Ansible for automated full-stack AWS deployment. (2025)
Cloud-Native Migration and Orchestration Provisioned AWS EKS cluster using Terraform with
containerized Docker microservices for fault-tolerant auto-scaling. (2025)
Declarative Continuous Deployment using GitOps Implemented ArgoCD GitOps workflow for
declarative configuration management and improved deployment stability. (2025)
End-to-End DevOps for E-Commerce Microservices Built complete CI/CD pipeline on AWS EKS
using Terraform, GitHub Actions, and ArgoCD for automated secure deployments. (2025)
Cryptographic System (2022) supporting Encryption, Decryption and crypt analysis (Cipher – Monoalphabetic –
Playfair – Hill cipher – Vigenere – Railfaince -Columnar – DES – AES – RSA - MD5 Hashing) using C++ (2022)
Bio metric Fingerprint Recognition system Using Matlab. Contains dataset of users fingerprints and it can detect
to which user this fingerprint belongs. (2022)
FOS : Implementing operating system main functions (Kernal heap – User heap – CPU secheduling – Page Fault
Modified Clock algorithm) using C language. (2022)
Languages
English (Intermediate) .

_________________________________________
Open to learning and exploring new areas. I’m a fresh graduate, a quick learner, and always
ready to take on new challenges. Through my internships and work experience, I’ve gained solid
skills in problem-solving and attention to detail. I also have a background in frontend
development using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and React.
___________________________________________________________________________
CORE PROFICIENCIES
- Html -Css -JavaScript
- Bootstrap -React -WordPress
- Elementor -SEO
___________________________________________________________________________
EXPERIENCE & TRAINING
Frontend Developer Intern – NGDC (12/2024 – 02/2025)
certificate: View Certificate
Software Engineering Future Course: The Front-end web development Diploma
certificate: View Course Certificate
___________________________________________________________________________
EDUCATION (2021 – 2024)
- Ain Shams University – Faculty of Computer and Information Science

Department: Information Systems (IS)

- Graduation Project: Crowdfunding Blockchain–Based System
•
Designed and developed a web and mobile application for secure crowdfunding and
project investment.
•
Built a blockchain-based platform on Ethereum using smart contracts to ensure
transparency, security, and trust.
Implemented features for campaign creation, secure investments, transaction
tracking, and real-time funding progress.
•
Integrated wallet connection, balance verification, and transaction history for a
seamless user experience.
•
Delivered a user-friendly and scalable system suitable for real-world investment use
cases.
___________________________________________________________________________
PROJECTS
Responsive WordPress Website for Value International Group
• Designed and developed the full website using WordPress with a focus on responsive design
and SEO best practices to enhance visibility and performance.
Technologies used: WordPress, Elementor, SEO tools, Google Search Console.
E-commerce WordPress Website for ViaLink
• Built a complete e-commerce website including product upload, online store configuration,

and payment system integration.
Technologies used: WordPress, WooCommerce, Elementor, SEO tools.
UI/UX Enhancement and Content Management for SESHub
• Improved the website’s user interface and user experience, and updated website content to
reflect the organization’s evolving needs.
Technologies used: WordPress, UI/UX design tools, content management.
High-Performance Website Development for SD Nutrition
• Developed the entire website from scratch with an emphasis on loading speed and SEO,
leading to improved search engine ranking.
Technologies used: WordPress, SEO optimization tools, performance testing tools.
SEO Optimization and Theme Customization for United Energy Egypt (new.ueel.co)
• Conducted a comprehensive review and testing of the website, customized theme
components, and implemented advanced SEO techniques for a high SEO score.
Technologies used: WordPress, custom themes, SEO audit tools.
E-commerce Site Maintenance for Coffee Capsules
• Provided continuous support including troubleshooting, product management, and feature
enhancements to maintain smooth operation.
Technologies used: WordPress, Elementor, WooCommerce.
Full Website Redesign for NGDC
• Led the complete redesign and implementation of a new version of the company’s website,
improving usability and overall aesthetic.
Technologies used: WordPress, UI/UX design, on-page SEO.

full_text:
New leap International junior science college
SUMMARY
May 2022 - March 2024
Higher Secondary Schooling
Aug 2024 - Exp. May 2028
Bachelor of Technology in Information Technology
Birla Vishvakarma Mahavidyalaya
Honours in Data Science and Analytics
I am a second-year IT undergraduate with a strong interest in Python programming and Data Science &
Analytics, focused on building a solid foundation in problem-solving and data-driven insights. Actively
engaged in coding challenges and technical events to enhance analytical thinking and practical skills, with a
passion for continuous learning and applying knowledge to real-world, data-driven solutions. Committed to
growing as a tech professional through hands-on projects and collaborative learning.
BHAVYA MODI
Gujarat, India | modibhavya128@gmail.com | bhavyamodi27.vercel.app
IT STUDENT
EDUCATION
CO-CURRICULAR ACTIVITIES
Actively participated in AWS Community Day 2026, gaining hands-on exposure to cloud
technologies and networking with industry professionals.
Selected among 8000+ participants for Convolve 4.0 Hackathon organized by IIT Madras,
competing in a national-level innovation challenge.
Selected for Policy Hackathon organized by IIT Kanpur, collaborating in a team to develop
problem-solving solutions under competitive constraints.
Completed 4-week Machine Learning Workshop organized by ML Club, BVM.
Human Resource Management System
Developed a Human Resource Management System to streamline employee data management,
attendance tracking, and payroll processes.
Automated recruitment and performance evaluation workflows to improve efficiency and reduce
administrative workload.
Integrated secure data handling and reporting features to enhance decision-making and
organizational transparency.
Saarthi AI
Designed and developed Saarthi AI to deliver smart, data-driven automation solutions for real-time
insights.
Enhanced system performance by optimizing AI models and streamlining workflows for faster and
more accurate results.
Integrated continuous monitoring and improvement mechanisms to ensure reliability, scalability,
and long-term efficiency.
TECHNICAL SKILLS / LANGUAGES
PROJECTS
Python
C++
HTML, CSS, JavaScript
PHP
MySQL
C
Pandas
Numpy
Data visualization

REFERENCES
Prof. Sherin M. Jijo
Assistant Professor, BVM
Suhani Modi
Application Developer, ODOO
Languages: English, Hindi, Gujarati
Certifications:
TCS iON Career Edge - Young Professional
Python(basics) By HackerRank
Awards/Activities: Genesis 2024 Departmental Winner and secured 3rd Rank in the Data Science
Quiz Competition.
ADDITIONAL INFORMATION
EXTRA-CURRICULAR ACTIVITIES
Actively contributed in NSS as a volunteer.
DECLARATION
I hereby confirm that the above information is accurate and authentic to the best of my knowledge.
Bhavya Modi

insights.

more accurate results.

and long-term efficiency.

full_text:
Yasmin Abdelaziz | Computer Science and Engineering Student
Cairo, Egypt | +201010705177 | yasmin.abdelaziiz52@gmail.com | GitHub | LinkedIn
PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
Motivated Computer Science and Engineering student at the German University in Cairo with strong interests in
software engineering and machine learning. Proven team player with hands-on experience in frontend development,
full-stack projects, and AI applications.
TECHNICAL SKILLS
Programming Languages: Java, Python, SQL, C, JavaScript, Haskell, Prolog
Frontend Development: HTML, CSS, React, Tailwind, Bootstrap
Machine Learning and AI: Supervised & Unsupervised Learning, Feature Engineering, PCA, Model Evaluation, Hyperparameter
Tuning
Tools and Libraries: Git, GitHub, TensorFlow, Scikit-learn, Pandas, NumPy, Matplotlib
WORK EXPERIENCE
Elevvo Pathways, Frontend Development Intern
July 2025 – Aug 2025
Technologies: React, Tailwind CSS, Chart.js, Bootstrap, Custom CSS
 Developed a Freelance Dashboard with analytics charts, project management, form validation, and
notifications using React and Tailwind CSS.
 Built a responsive SaaS landing page with dark/light mode, animations, and interactive sections, improving
UI/UX and responsiveness.
PROJECT EXPERIENCE
University Event Management Web Application (MERN Stack)
 Built a full-stack MERN web application for managing university events with role-based access, approval
workflows, and event registration, developed using Agile methodology and collaborative GitHub workflows.
Internship System – Software Engineering and Front-End Development Project
 Developed as part of a team a front-end prototype of a comprehensive internship management system using
React, JavaScript, and Bootstrap, with a strong focus on user experience and interface consistency. Also
contributed to the software engineering phase by defining and refining functional and non-functional requirements
to guide system design and ensure usability and scalability.
Telecom Customer Data Management System
 Collaborated in a team to develop a web application using ASP.NET and SQL to manage telecom customer
data, including profiles, service plans, payments, and usage. Enabled seamless account creation and efficient
data retrieval to enhance user experience and streamline operations.
Machine Learning Full Pipeline for Heart Disease Prediction
 Developed a comprehensive end-to-end machine learning pipeline to analyze, predict, and visualize heart disease
risk using the UCI Heart Disease dataset. Implemented data preprocessing, feature engineering, dimensionality
reduction (PCA), supervised learning with hyperparameter optimization, unsupervised clustering for pattern
discovery, and interactive web deployment.
Attack on Titan: Utopia Game
 Collaborated in a team to develop a tower defense endless game inspired by the anime of Attack on Titan using
Java making use of the concepts of Object-Oriented Programming.
Embedded Escape Room Station
 Built an embedded escape-room station using Arduino Nano RP2040 in a team setting, integrating
sensors/actuators, writing C driver-level control logic, and applying basic AI/computer-vision concepts for system
interaction—strengthening embedded development, hardware interfacing, and practical problem-solving.
EDUCATION
German University in Cairo
2022 – Present
B.Sc., Computer Science and Engineering
Cumulative GPA: 3.6 – Very Good
Rowad College School
2019 – 2022
IGCSE High School Diploma
CERTIFICATES
Machine Learning Specialization, Stanford University and DeepLearning.AI | Link
July 2025 – Sep 2025
AI and Machine Learning Summer Camp, Sprints and Microsoft | Link
Aug 2025 – Sep 2025
LANGUAGES
Arabic: Native | English: Proficient | German: A2

full_text:
Hedy Lamarr
hedylamarr@email.edu • (555) 555-5555 • linkedin.com/in/hedylamarr111

EDUCATION

University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill | Chapel Hill, NC ​ May 2026
B.S. in Computer Science, Statistics ​

Relevant Courses: Machine Learning, Data Structures, Algorithms, Files & Databases, Object-Oriented Programming

TECHNICAL SKILLS

Languages: C, Java, JavaScript, Python, R, Scala, SQL
Technologies: Docker, Flask, Git, Node.js, PyTorch, React.js, REST APIs
Tools: Apache Beam/Hadoop/Spark, BigQuery, GCP, Jira, Jenkins, Jupyter, Snowflake, Tableau

EXPERIENCE

Spotify | New York, NY ​
June 2025 - Aug. 2025
Data Engineer Intern​

●​ Designed a cumulative aggregated dataset hosted in BigQuery and GCS to unify multiple data pipelines for podcast
consumption metadata, centralizing data sources and reducing computational overhead for various metrics
●​ Implemented the dataset using Scala and Apache Beam APIs, achieving a 60% compression versus the raw metadata source
and enabling faster, more efficient queries
●​ Analyzed hundreds of trending, book-based playlists and conducted A/B tests to validate targeted audiobook campaigns,
uncovering avenues for audience growth
UNC Department of Computer Science | Chapel Hill, NC​
Aug. 2024 - Present
Lead Teaching Assistant​

●​ Hosting 10 weekly office hours and grading exams for over 200 students enrolled in Object-Oriented Programming
●​ Managing and coordinating support tasks for 12 undergraduate teaching assistants
Apple Inc. | Cupertino, CA ​
May 2024 - Aug. 2024
Data Engineer Intern​

●​ Pioneered a multi-level Tableau dashboard system for Apple Maps, automating project status reporting and KPI monitoring
for 10+ regional sub-teams
●​ Streamlined complex data sources in Hive using data wrangling techniques, reducing metric reporting time by 95%
●​ Evaluated and presented findings and recommendations for data infrastructure optimization to senior VPs
Comtech Telecommunications | Remote ​
May 2023 - May 2024
Software Engineer Intern ​

●​ Built and deployed 8 new front-end features and improvements to the emergency locator web platform within 6 months
●​ Automated 100% of the backend API test suite using Node.js and Chai and implemented real-time status monitors for
critical APIs, leading to a 95% reduction in error response time

PROJECTS

RoadRisk | R, Python ​
December 2024
●​ Interpreted over 6 million traffic incident records and built Random Forest, Naive Bayes, Logistic Regression, and SVM
models to predict accident severity, reaching an accuracy of 83%
●​ Employed dimension reduction and random undersampling techniques to improve model performance by +10%
Flaming Insights | Python, Tableau ​
September 2024
●​ Conducted data analysis on 1.88 million wildfire records spanning 24 years, revealing a significant increase in the
frequency of wildfires, with an annual growth rate of 3.5%
●​ Identified the top 5 fire-prone counties and found that Human Activity was the leading cause in 64% of cases

EDUCATION

University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill | Chapel Hill, NC ​ May 2026
B.S. in Computer Science, Statistics ​

TECHNICAL SKILLS

Languages: C, Java, JavaScript, Python, R, Scala, SQL
Technologies: Docker, Flask, Git, Node.js, PyTorch, React.js, REST APIs
Tools: Apache Beam/Hadoop/Spark, BigQuery, GCP, Jira, Jenkins, Jupyter, Snowflake, Tableau
EXPERIENCE

Spotify | New York, NY ​
June 2025 - Aug. 2025
Data Engineer Intern​
●​ Designed a cumulative aggregated dataset hosted in BigQuery and GCS to unify multiple data pipelines for podcast

consumption metadata, centralizing data sources and reducing computational overhead for various metrics
●​ Implemented the dataset using Scala and Apache Beam APIs, achieving a 60% compression versus the raw metadata source

and enabling faster, more efficient queries
●​ Analyzed hundreds of trending, book-based playlists and conducted A/B tests to validate targeted audiobook campaigns,
uncovering avenues for audience growth

UNC Department of Computer Science | Chapel Hill, NC​
Aug. 2024 - Present
Lead Teaching Assistant​
●​ Hosting 10 weekly office hours and grading exams for over 200 students enrolled in Object-Oriented Programming
●​ Managing and coordinating support tasks for 12 undergraduate teaching assistants

Apple Inc. | Cupertino, CA ​
May 2024 - Aug. 2024
Data Engineer Intern​
●​ Pioneered a multi-level Tableau dashboard system for Apple Maps, automating project status reporting and KPI monitoring

for 10+ regional sub-teams
●​ Streamlined complex data sources in Hive using data wrangling techniques, reducing metric reporting time by 95%
●​ Evaluated and presented findings and recommendations for data infrastructure optimization to senior VPs

Comtech Telecommunications | Remote ​
May 2023 - May 2024
Software Engineer Intern ​
●​ Built and deployed 8 new front-end features and improvements to the emergency locator web platform within 6 months
●​ Automated 100% of the backend API test suite using Node.js and Chai and implemented real-time status monitors for
critical APIs, leading to a 95% reduction in error response time
PROJECTS

RoadRisk | R, Python ​
December 2024

models to predict accident severity, reaching an accuracy of 83%

Flaming Insights | Python, Tableau ​
September 2024
●​ Conducted data analysis on 1.88 million wildfire records spanning 24 years, revealing a significant increase in the

frequency of wildfires, with an annual growth rate of 3.5%
●​ Identified the top 5 fire-prone counties and found that Human Activity was the leading cause in 64% of cases

coordination and communication.

Ehab Abdelkader Software Engineer
ehabknowledge@gmail.com

010 30932402

Cairo, Egypt

linkedin.com/in/ehab2026

github.com/Houba3

Profile
Motivated Computer Engineering student at the German University in Cairo with a strong focus on Artificial Intelligence
and Machine Learning. Experienced in building intelligent and data-driven applications using Python and modern full-
stack technologies. Skilled in developing user-centered interfaces and integrating AI solutions into real-world systems.
Passionate about leveraging AI to create impactful and efficient software solutions.
Internships
Information Technology Intern
Arab African International Bank
• Completed a rotational internship across multiple IT domains, gaining practical exposure
to infrastructure management, application support, and cybersecurity operations.
08/2025 – 09/2025
Cairo, Egypt
• Applied technical skills in virtualization, system monitoring, debugging, and performance
testing while exploring secure system design and automation concepts.
• Collaborated with cross-functional teams to understand large-scale IT architectures and
how technology, data, and security systems drive reliable banking operations.
Web Development Intern
Power Solution Co.
• Developed visually engaging, mobile-friendly web interfaces using HTML, CSS, and PHP,
ensuring a responsive and accessible user experience.
08/2024 – 09/2024
Cairo, Egypt
• Participated in debugging and performance optimization, identifying bottlenecks and
improving page load speed.
• Collaborated with the development team to document workflows and enhance overall
project efficiency.
Projects
AI-Powered FPL Analytics Assistant
• Built a Graph-RAG system combining Neo4j Knowledge Graph and LLMs to deliver
grounded travel insights.
11/2026 – 12/2026
• Implemented intent classification, entity extraction, Cypher retrieval, and embedding-based
semantic search.
• Developed a Streamlit UI and evaluated multiple LLMs for response quality and accuracy.
AI-Gamified Educational Web App for Children
• Designed a user-centered educational web application prototype in Figma for children and
parents.
10/2025 – 12/2025
• Developed personas, task flows, and interaction designs based on real user interviews.
• Created a gamified interface with a parent dashboard and evaluated usability using
heuristic analysis and user testing.
A Deep Learning Approach for Skin Disease Identification(Bachelor Project)⁠
• Utilized Python and TensorFlow to train, evaluate, and visualize deep learning models for
skin disease classification using the HAM10000 dataset.
02/2025 – 05/2025
• Applied data balancing techniques such as resampling and data augmentation to improve
model accuracy and handle class imbalance.
• Leveraged AutoML tools, including AutoKeras, for neural architecture search and
hyperparameter tuning, and compared automated results with manually designed CNN
models.

Virtual Trip Planner⁠
• Developed a comprehensive travel planning web application with custom itineraries,
booking systems, budget tracking, and real-time notifications.
09/2024 – 12/2024
• Utilized the MERN stack (MongoDB, Express.js, React, Node.js) to create a scalable and
interactive platform.
• Employed Agile development methodologies for continuous feature enhancements and
efficient team collaboration.
• Ranked among the top 5 websites for functionality, UI/​UX, and system performance.
Tilt-Based Car Control System
• Developed a gesture-controlled car that adjusts direction and speed based on hand tilt
movements.
10/2024 – 12/2024
• Incorporated Raspberry Pi Pico W and Arduino Nano RP200 Connect for accurate motion
control and real-time responsiveness.
Donation Banking System⁠
• Created a secure and responsive donation management system, simplifying the process of
receiving and tracking contributions.
03/2024 – 05/2024
• Designed an intuitive front-end with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, ensuring a smooth,
accessible user experience across all devices.
• Prioritized UI/​UX best practices to enhance user engagement and interaction.
University Advising System
• Developed a university advising platform with a SQL database to help students monitor
academic progress and course requirements.
09/2023 – 12/2023
• Created a C-based backend and an intuitive HTML front-end, enhancing data management
and user accessibility.
The Last of Us - 2D Game Development
• Designed and developed a 2D action game featuring zombies vs. heroes gameplay, applying
object-oriented programming (OOP) principles in Java.
03/2023 – 06/2023
• Implemented core game logic, and real-time interactions through modular Java classes.
Education
German University in Cairo (10th semester)
Bachelor's Degree in Computer Engineering
German System GPA: 1.9 | Grade: Very Good (84%)
2021 – 2026
Sun of Knowledge British International School (SBIS)
High School Diploma (IGCSE)
Overall Percentage: 98 %
Skills
MERN Stack, Agile Methodology
ML Model Training &
Optimization
Database Management & SQL
Version Control(GIT)
Communication & Collaboration
Python (Matplotlib, NumPy)
UI/UX Design & Accessibility
Customer-Centric Problem-
Solving
Full-stack Development
Extracurricular Activities
• Collaborated with teams to usher tech-based competitions (IEEE), sports events (Inspire), and artistic events (Warsha),
ensuring smooth event execution.
• Supported the organization of major university events, including graduation ceremonies, demonstrating strong
teamwork, communication, and coordination skills.

Cairo, Egypt | (+20)1559116018 | eng.elsayed.mohamed2@gmail.com | www.linkedin.com/in/elsayed-mohamed5

Professional Summary
Motivated and versatile IT professional with a strong foundation in networking, system administration, and technical
support. Hands-on experience with routing and switching, TCP/IP, VLANs, Windows Server administration, Linux system
management, and FortiGate firewall security. Trained through practical programs including CompTIA A+, Network+,
CCNA, MCSA, and Red Hat Linux. Seeking a junior position as an IT Help Desk Specialist with a focus on Network &
Technical Support.

COURSES & HANDS-ON TRAINING
CompTIA A+ (Online Training) – Instructor: Eng. Ahmed El-Mashayekhi | Feb – May 2023
• Completed CompTIA A+ training covering computer hardware, operating systems, troubleshooting, networking
fundamentals, and IT support basics.
CompTIA Network+ (Online Training) – Instructor: Eng. Sameh Ramadan | Jun – Aug 2023
• Studied core networking concepts including network fundamentals, TCP/IP, routing & switching basics, network
troubleshooting, and security fundamentals.
CCNA (Routing & Switching) – National Telecommunication Institute (NTI) | Dec – Feb 2024
• Completed CCNA practical training, including hands-on configuration of routers and switches, IP addressing,
VLANs, and network troubleshooting.
Windows Server Administration (MCSA) – Information Technology Institute (ITI) | Apr – May 2024
• Completed MCSA practical training focusing on Windows Server installation, Active Directory management,

Group Policy, DHCP, DNS, and server backup procedures.
Linux Administration – National Telecommunication Institute (NTI) | Aug – Sep 2024
• Completed Red Hat System Administration I & II (RH124, RH134) with practical labs on user management,
permissions, network services configuration, and Linux system maintenance.
FortiGate Firewall – Information Technology Institute (ITI) | Jul – Sep 2025
• Hands-on training in FortiGate firewall management, including policy configuration, VPN setup, intrusion
prevention, and network security monitoring. Gained practical skills in securing and managing enterprise
networks.

PROJECTS
Graduation Project – Enterprise Network for Software Company (ENSC)
Role: Network & Windows Server Administrator
•
Designed and implemented an enterprise network infrastructure for a simulated software company environment.
•
Configured and managed Windows Server roles including Active Directory, DHCP, DNS, WDS, WSUS, IIS, File & Print
Services, and Backup solutions.
•
Implemented user and group management using Active Directory and Group Policy.
•
Ensured secure, scalable, and stable network services for users within the project environment.
•
Managed and troubleshot virtual environments using VMware Workstation and GNS3.

Technical Skills
•
Networking: TCP/IP, VLANs, Routing & Switching, Network Troubleshooting.
•
Windows Server Administration: Installation and configuration of Windows Server, Active Directory (AD DS),
DNS, DHCP, Group Policy (GPO), WSUS, IIS, WDS, File & Print Services.
•
Linux Administration: User and permission management, services configuration, basic Bash scripting.
•
Virtualization: Hands-on experience with VMware Workstation and VirtualBox.
•
Tools & Technologies: Cisco Packet Tracer, VMware Workstation, Oracle VirtualBox, GNS3, PNETLab, Wireshark,
PuTTY, MobaXterm.
•
Security Fundamentals: Basic firewall configuration using FortiGate, network security concepts (ACLs, NAT).
•
Soft Skills: Teamwork, Time Management, Adaptability, Communication, Critical Thinking.

EDUCATION
•
B.Sc. in Computer Science and Artificial Intelligence | Sohag University ( 2021– 2025 )
•
Graduation Grade: Very Good | Project Grade: Excellent
CERTIFICATIONS & ACHIEVEMENTS
•
CCNA National Telecommunication Institute (NTI). Certificates
•
Red Hat System Administration I (RH124) & II (RH134). Certificates

Languages
•
Arabic: Native
•
English: Very Good

pages.text:
PROJECTS
News App | Dart, visual studio
The News App delivers real-time updates on a wide range of topics, keeping you connected to the world.
Chat App | Dart, visual studio
(User Auth - Real time DB - UI design - Messaging Funcs - Group chat)
Chat with other users easily and chat with group of users with real time updates . keeping you connected to the
world.
Skin diseases detector | Dart, AI model, Image Processing
Explore skin diseases with AI by sending image for it, analyze image and detect the disease, give you some medical
advices and show you nearest doctor for you.
Doctor 404 | Dart , VR
program that utilizes virtual reality technologies to deliver psychotherapy.
connect user and doctor with VR, designing 3D environments to simulate situations that individuals may encounter.
Incorporating tools to guide users and teach them fear coping strategies and stress management techniques.
Ensuring that the program complies with safety and privacy standards, protecting user data and ensuring it is not
leaked.
Arts App | Flutter, API Integration
(Profile - Event Details - Product Details - Add to Cart - Responsive Design- Booking your ticket)
Discover events and products effortlessly, manage your profile, and enjoy seamless shopping with a responsive and
user-friendly experience. (this was my ITI graduation project)
COURSES AND CAMPS
25- 27 Nov 2022
Information-Technology-Institute-(ITI)
Social innovation camp Ismailia, Egypt
15-20 March 2022
UNICEF
Civic education course Harghada, Egypt

Ereny Wagih Massoud
Contact
01220523236
erenywagih70@gmail.com
Mostafa Kamel St., Smoha, Alexandria.
Sep 2021 – Jun 2025
Alexandria University
Bachelor of Science in Computer and Data
Science Alexandria University—
Department of Intelligent Systems
Education
skills
Python
Machine Learning
Natural Language Processing (NLP)
Computer Vision
Deep Learning (RNN, LSTM, CNN)
Data Preprocessing
Arduino & IoT Basics
Jupyter Notebook & Google Colab
Teamwork & Collaboration
Problem Solving
Fast Learner
Profile Summary
Recent Intelligent Systems graduate with a strong foundation in machine
learning, NLP, and computer vision. Passionate about applying AI techniques to
solve real-world problems. Fast learner with solid programming skills and
experience working on academic projects. Actively seeking an entry-level
opportunity to contribute to innovative AI solutions and grow in the field.
Projects & Training
Graduation Project – “Spoken Sign” Communication App
Gun Detection System
Chatbot
Developed a mobile application that translates American Sign
Language (ASL) into spoken language in real time to support
communication for the hearing-impaired. Used 3 models (STT,
NLP, TTS)
Worked within a team to build a real-time object detection model
that identifies the presence of guns in images and video streams.
Created a chatbot using deep learning techniques to simulate
human-like conversations for educational purposes.
NLP Text Enhancement Projects
Implemented various Natural Language Processing projects
focused on improving datasets (text cleaning, grammar correction,
tokenization) and training models for sentiment analysis and text
classification.
IoT Training—Alexandria University
Completed a hands-on IoT training program involving Arduino
programming, sensor integration, and basic circuit design for smart
systems.
Other Academic Projects
Worked on a wide range of academic projects throughout my
studies, covering diverse topics in AI, data science, NLP, computer
vision, and more—gaining hands-on experience in solving real-
world problems through code and collaboration.
Arabic: Native.
English: very good.
Italian: Basics.
Languages

PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
Full Stack Developer with hands-on experience in .NET, ASP.NET Core, MERN Stack, and SQL Server. Strong
background in building RESTful APIs, MVC applications, and scalable web systems. Skilled in both frontend and
backend development, database design, and system integration.
TECHNICAL SKILLS
Languages: C#, JavaScript, TypeScript, PHP, Python
Frameworks: ASP.NET Core, Node.js, Express.js, React
Databases: SQL Server, MySQL, MongoDB
Concepts: RESTful APIs, MVC, Authentication & Authorization, CRUD, Responsive Design
Tools: Git, GitHub, VS Code, Firebase

WORK EXPERIENCE
Full Stack / Frontend Developer | Freelancer | 2021 – 2023
• Built responsive web applications and integrated them with backend APIs
• Used HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Bootstrap, and Node.js/React for multiple client projects
• Ensured cross-browser compatibility and on-time delivery
Technical Support Specialist | Telecom Egypt (WE) | Aug – Nov 2025
• Diagnosed and resolved customer internet/telecom issues; logged requests in internal systems
Accountant | MADO Company | Nov 2025 – Present

• Developed dynamic web applications using PHP and MySQL

PROJECTS

• Full-stack e-commerce system with authentication, product management, and order handling

• PHP Engineer Training – Information Technology Institute (ITI)
• MEAN Stack Training – Orange Digital Center
Web Development Fundamentals

full_text:
Fatma Osama Hanafi
ï fatmaosamahanafi — H 01225408657 — # fosama1570@gmail.com
Professional Summary
3rd-year Computer Science student (Exp. July 2027) specializing in the intersection of robust software engineering and high-impact
data science. Proficient in architecting test-driven systems with rigorous testing. Experienced in engineering end-to-end ML pipelines
for datasets exceeding 2M+ records, achieving 85 % recall and providing transparent case-level explanations.
Education
Oct 2023 - Exp. July 2027
BSc in Computer Science, German International University
DAAD Grant Recipient
Oct 2010 - June 2023
High School Diploma, IGCSE, Misr Language Schools (Grade: 100%)
Certifications
August 2025
Mobile Development by Flutter - Sprints
July 2025
Introducing Generative AI with AWS - Udacity
AWS AI & ML Scholars Program
Skills
• Languages: Python, Java, JavaScript, TypeScript, Dart,
SQL, C++, C#
• Frontend: React, Flutter, HTML5, CSS, Tailwind CSS
• Backend: Node.js, Express.js, NestJS, ASP.NET Core
• Databases: MongoDB, SQL Server, Supabase(PostgreSQL)
• Data Science/ML: Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-learn
• Tools: Git, GitHub, Postman, Jest, Playwright, Vitest,
PowerBI
Projects
• Healthcare Appointment Platform ”Se7ety” (React, Express.js, Supabase, Playwright) — Oct - Dec 2025 §
– Architected a feature-based layered monolith for a medical booking system featuring real-time messaging via Socket.io and
secure RBAC for patients and doctors.
– Engineered a rigorous testing package with Unit (Jest/Vitest), Integration (Supertest), and E2E (Playwright) tests to ensure
full coverage of critical booking and conflict detection logic.
– Integrated Supabase for PostgreSQL management and authentication, delivering a responsive UI with Tailwind CSS.
• Medicare Fraud Detection System (Python, Scikit-learn, SHAP, Pandas) — Nov - Dec 2025 §
– Implemented an end-to-end ML pipeline to detect fraudulent providers in a dataset of 550K+ claims, addressing severe class
imbalance (9.35% fraud) using SMOTE and class weighting.
– Optimized a 3-tier model architecture (Gradient Boosting, AdaBoost, Random Forest), achieving 85% recall and providing
explainability through SHAP value case studies for investigators.
– Evaluated business impact with an estimated annual recovery of $78M-$86M based on precision-tuned detection thresholds.
• NYC Motor Vehicle Collision Analytics (Python, Pandas, Dash, Plotly) — Nov 2025 §
– Built a data engineering pipeline to clean and integrate 2M+ records from NYC Open Data, utilizing Parquet for 10x faster
loading performance.
– Developed an interactive dashboard with dynamic filtering and a search mode to visualize borough-level crash severity,
temporal patterns, and contributing factors.
– Implemented modular visualization components and centralized data caching to ensure real-time responsiveness.
• HR Management System - Payroll Tracking (TypeScript, NestJS, Next.js, MongoDB) — Nov - Dec 2025 §
– Contributed to a large-scale modular HR platform, specifically leading the development of the Payroll Tracking and Employee
Self-Service sub-system.
– Engineered secure backend services for salary breakdown visualization, dispute submission, and automated reimbursement
status tracking.
– Collaborated across sub-teams to ensure seamless data flow between Organizational Structure, Time Management, and Payroll
modules.
• Movies Industry Insights Dashboard (PowerBI, Power Query, DAX) — Dec 2025
– Designed a comprehensive PowerBI report analyzing global box office trends, genre performance, and production ROI.
– Performed ETL processes to clean raw industry datasets and authored DAX measures for complex financial KPIs and year-
over-year comparisons.
Extracurricular Activities
• Curriculum Committee Member, GIU (Nov 2023 - Present): Contribute to reviewing academic programs, suggesting
improvements, and co-developing interdisciplinary courses integrating emerging technologies.

sections.heading: Projects
sections.content:
• Healthcare Appointment Platform ”Se7ety” (React, Express.js, Supabase, Playwright) — Oct - Dec 2025 §
– Architected a feature-based layered monolith for a medical booking system featuring real-time messaging via Socket.io and
secure RBAC for patients and doctors.
– Engineered a rigorous testing package with Unit (Jest/Vitest), Integration (Supertest), and E2E (Playwright) tests to ensure
full coverage of critical booking and conflict detection logic.
– Integrated Supabase for PostgreSQL management and authentication, delivering a responsive UI with Tailwind CSS.
• Medicare Fraud Detection System (Python, Scikit-learn, SHAP, Pandas) — Nov - Dec 2025 §
– Implemented an end-to-end ML pipeline to detect fraudulent providers in a dataset of 550K+ claims, addressing severe class
imbalance (9.35% fraud) using SMOTE and class weighting.
– Optimized a 3-tier model architecture (Gradient Boosting, AdaBoost, Random Forest), achieving 85% recall and providing
explainability through SHAP value case studies for investigators.
– Evaluated business impact with an estimated annual recovery of $78M-$86M based on precision-tuned detection thresholds.
• NYC Motor Vehicle Collision Analytics (Python, Pandas, Dash, Plotly) — Nov 2025 §
– Built a data engineering pipeline to clean and integrate 2M+ records from NYC Open Data, utilizing Parquet for 10x faster
loading performance.
– Developed an interactive dashboard with dynamic filtering and a search mode to visualize borough-level crash severity,
temporal patterns, and contributing factors.
– Implemented modular visualization components and centralized data caching to ensure real-time responsiveness.
• HR Management System - Payroll Tracking (TypeScript, NestJS, Next.js, MongoDB) — Nov - Dec 2025 §
– Contributed to a large-scale modular HR platform, specifically leading the development of the Payroll Tracking and Employee
Self-Service sub-system.
– Engineered secure backend services for salary breakdown visualization, dispute submission, and automated reimbursement
status tracking.
– Collaborated across sub-teams to ensure seamless data flow between Organizational Structure, Time Management, and Payroll
modules.
• Movies Industry Insights Dashboard (PowerBI, Power Query, DAX) — Dec 2025
– Designed a comprehensive PowerBI report analyzing global box office trends, genre performance, and production ROI.
– Performed ETL processes to clean raw industry datasets and authored DAX measures for complex financial KPIs and year-
over-year comparisons.
Extracurricular Activities
• Curriculum Committee Member, GIU (Nov 2023 - Present): Contribute to reviewing academic programs, suggesting
improvements, and co-developing interdisciplinary courses integrating emerging technologies.

SOC Analyst Trainee, AMIT Learning

07/2025 – Present

• SIEM monitoring & log correlation (QRadar, Splunk) with network traffic analysis

• Applied core security principles (CIA triad) and defenses against ransomware &
DDoS

07/2025 – 09/2025
• Hands-on labs in pentesting, vulnerability assessment & digital forensics (Burp
Suite, Wireshark)
• Network security fundamentals: design, protocols, firewalls & routers
• OSINT investigations using Google Dorking, Shodan, SOCMINT/​IMINT
• Web app security with focus on OWASP Top 10 and secure coding (HTML/​JS/​PHP)
• Endpoint security, incident response, and SOC workflows
Cybersecurity Trainee, NTI Cybersecurity Camp
• End-to-end penetration testing (PTES) using Nmap, OSINT, Metasploit, Hydra &
Kali Linux
• MITRE ATT&CK for threat modeling and adversary tactic mapping
08/2025 – 08/2025

• Vulnerability assessment using Nessus/​OpenVAS with CVSS scoring & risk-based
remediation
• Threat hunting & log analysis (Splunk, ELK Stack) + network investigation
(Wireshark)

• Implemented NIST CSF & ISO 27001 for governance and risk management
• Web app testing against OWASP Top 10 using Burp Suite & OWASP ZAP
T-SQL Queries Using SQL Server, MaharaTech
• Designed EERD models to visualize complex relational schemas
• Developed optimized T-SQL queries (joins, subqueries, window functions: LEAD,
DENSE_RANK)
07/2025 – 07/2025
• Enforced data integrity using constraints, keys & identity columns
• Managed database security (roles, schemas, user access controls)
• Improved performance via query optimization & CRUD operations
• Supported front-end apps & reporting with reliable database solutions
Ethical Hacking,
The Egyptian Science House and The American Board of Professional Studies
• Performed network reconnaissance and service enumeration using Nmap to map
attack surfaces
• Leveraged Metasploit Framework to research and deploy exploits against
vulnerable services
09/2024 – 11/2024
• Engineered custom payloads with Msfvenom to establish reverse shells with
evasion techniques
• Executed post-exploitation activities including privilege escalation and lateral
movement

11/2025 – 12/2025
• Implemented real-time visualization, analytics dashboards, and infection
timelines for threat analysis.
• Designed budget-based security defenses and incident response actions to
evaluate cost–benefit and performance outcomes
Car Wash Simulation⁠ , Cairo University Operating system course project
• Designed and built a fully interactive Java-based car-wash simulation using Swing
and multithreading
• The system models car arrivals, waiting areas, and washing pumps using custom
semaphores for synchronization.Includes real-time visualization of queues, pump
allocation, and activity logs.
11/2025 – 11/2025
Highlights:
• Custom semaphore implementation for safe, thread-controlled access
• Producer–Consumer workflow for queue + pump management

• Dynamic GUI with real-time status updates
• Demonstrated thread safety, resource sharing, and OS-style coordination
Command Line Interpreter⁠ , Cairo university Operating systems course project
• Designed and implemented a robust Java-based Command Line Interpreter
(CLI) that accurately parsed user input and executed a suite of 15+ core system
commands (e.g., cd, ls, mkdir, cp, wc), demonstrating strong proficiency in object-
oriented programming and problem-solving.
• Engineered advanced file system management features, including handling
relative/absolute paths, output redirection (>, >>), and file archiving (zip, unzip),
which involved direct manipulation of the operating system's file structure and
showcased a deep understanding of OS fundamentals
10/2025 – 10/2025
Tools: Microsoft visual studio code, Java
Food Ordering System⁠ , Cairo University Database Course Final Project
• Designed and implemented a Food Ordering System using database concepts
such as ER modeling, normalization, and referential integrity.
• Developed the backend with SQL for data manipulation, implemented
application logic in C# and applied data validation rules for accuracy and security.
04/2025 – 05/2025
• Tools: Microsoft Visual Studio, Power Designer, Microsoft SQL server
Rotating LEDs⁠ , Cairo University Logic Design Course Final Project
• Designed and implemented LED sequencing logic circuits utilizing
microcontroller programming.
• Developed core competencies in timing logic, delay programming, and hands-on
hardware debugging.
04/2024 – 05/2024

Line Follower Vehicle⁠ , Cairo University Electronics-1 Course Final Project
• Enhanced practical knowledge of control systems, embedded programming, and
analog sensor integration.
• Architected and constructed an autonomous track-following robot using IR
sensors and motor control circuits.
04/2024 – 05/2024

• Developed a frontend-only cybersecurity simulation using HTML5, CSS3,
JavaScript, Canvas, and Chart.js.
• Modeled worm, virus, and trojan propagation across Star, Ring, Tree, and Mesh
network topologies.
11/2025 – 12/2025
• Implemented real-time visualization, analytics dashboards, and infection
timelines for threat analysis.
• Designed budget-based security defenses and incident response actions to
evaluate cost–benefit and performance outcomes
Car Wash Simulation⁠ , Cairo University Operating system course project
• Designed and built a fully interactive Java-based car-wash simulation using Swing
and multithreading
• The system models car arrivals, waiting areas, and washing pumps using custom
semaphores for synchronization.Includes real-time visualization of queues, pump
allocation, and activity logs.
11/2025 – 11/2025
Highlights:
• Custom semaphore implementation for safe, thread-controlled access
• Producer–Consumer workflow for queue + pump management
• Dynamic GUI with real-time status updates
• Demonstrated thread safety, resource sharing, and OS-style coordination
Command Line Interpreter⁠ , Cairo university Operating systems course project
• Designed and implemented a robust Java-based Command Line Interpreter
(CLI) that accurately parsed user input and executed a suite of 15+ core system
commands (e.g., cd, ls, mkdir, cp, wc), demonstrating strong proficiency in object-
oriented programming and problem-solving.
• Engineered advanced file system management features, including handling
relative/absolute paths, output redirection (>, >>), and file archiving (zip, unzip),
which involved direct manipulation of the operating system's file structure and
showcased a deep understanding of OS fundamentals
10/2025 – 10/2025
Tools: Microsoft visual studio code, Java
Food Ordering System⁠ , Cairo University Database Course Final Project
• Designed and implemented a Food Ordering System using database concepts
such as ER modeling, normalization, and referential integrity.
• Developed the backend with SQL for data manipulation, implemented
application logic in C# and applied data validation rules for accuracy and security.
04/2025 – 05/2025
• Tools: Microsoft Visual Studio, Power Designer, Microsoft SQL server
Rotating LEDs⁠ , Cairo University Logic Design Course Final Project
• Designed and implemented LED sequencing logic circuits utilizing
microcontroller programming.
• Developed core competencies in timing logic, delay programming, and hands-on
hardware debugging.
04/2024 – 05/2024
• Tools: Arduino
Line Follower Vehicle⁠ , Cairo University Electronics-1 Course Final Project
• Enhanced practical knowledge of control systems, embedded programming, and
analog sensor integration.
• Architected and constructed an autonomous track-following robot using IR
sensors and motor control circuits.
04/2024 – 05/2024
• Tools: Arduino

02/2026

10/2025

full_text:
GWARGIOS MOURIS AMIN
Offensive Cybersecurity & Penetration Testing Enthusiast
Cairo, Egypt | Phone/WhatsApp: 01278728387 / 01069962496 | Email: gawargios6@outlook.com |
LinkedIn | GitHub

Professional Summary
Motivated and results-driven Computer and Information Science student with a solid background in
programming (OOP, data structures, algorithms) and cybersecurity. Experienced in web and network
penetration testing, vulnerability research, and web application security, with hands-on practice through
CTFs and Hack The Box — having completed the Network Penetration Tester and Bug Bounty learning
paths.

Familiar with advanced web exploitation techniques and methodologies aligned with eWPTX-
level training, demonstrating a strong understanding of chained attacks, code review, and real-
world exploitation.

Strong problem-solving and analytical mindset with a focus on adversarial thinking, exploit development,
and real-world offensive security techniques. Eager to contribute technical expertise and proactive
learning attitude to a professional Red Team or cybersecurity environment.
Technical Skills
Programming & Scripting: Python, Bash, C++, Java, JavaScript, C, R
Web Application Security: OWASP Top 10, Burp Suite, SQL Injection, XSS, IDOR, Command
Injection, CSRF, Source Code Review (JavaScript)
Network & Infrastructure: Network Attacks, Pivoting & Tunneling, Service Exploitation,
Metasploit, Nmap, Nessus
Operating Systems: Kali Linux, Windows
Databases: MySQL, Oracle
Cybersecurity Domains: Penetration Testing, Vulnerability Research, Red Teaming Methodologies.
AI: AI-assisted developer with hands-on experience leveraging Claude Opus 4.5 and ChatGPT Codex
Max for rapid, high-quality software development, debugging, and system design.
OSINT Pro – Intelligence Gathering Platform: Architected a scalable OSINT system with background
workers, modular services, and audit logging.Implemented identity correlation, breach risk assessment,
and multi-source data aggregation.Focused on security, compliance, and ethical OSINT practices.
Professional Training & Certifications
Hack The Box Academy
Penetration Tester Job Role Path (Completed)
Bug Bounty Hunter Job Role Path (Completed)
Mastered skills in Active Directory enumeration & exploitation, network pivoting, web application
vulnerability hunting, service exploitation, and end-to-end penetration testing methodologies.

National Telecommunication Institute (NTI) & ITIDA
Intensive Summer Training in Network Security (120 Hours | Final Score: 95%)
Comprehensive training covering technical network security principles and professional soft skills.

Advanced Cyber Security & Penetration Testing Course On Udemy(120+ Hours)

In-depth training on Linux+, Web & Network Attacks, Source Code Review, Active Directory Hacking,
and OSINT. Gained expertise in tools like Nmap, Nessus, Acunetix, Metasploit, and Burp Suite.

Master Bash Scripting: From Beginner to Advanced
Mastered Bash fundamentals and advanced techniques to build automated reconnaissance tools,
security scanners, and notification systems.

Self-Study & Advanced Knowledge
Gained comprehensive understanding of the eLearnSecurity Web Application Penetration Tester
eXtreme (eWPTX) course content, including advanced web exploitation, code review, and chained
attack techniques.
Continuously practicing and applying methodologies aligned with eWPTX in real-world labs and CTF
environments.

Certifications In Progress:
Certified Penetration Testing Specialist (CPTS)
Certified Bug Bounty Hunter (CBBH)
Practical Experience & Projects
CTF & Hands-On Practice | Hack The Box
Actively solving labs and challenges on Hack The Box and PortSwigger platforms. Demonstrated
proficiency with progress in Offensive (45%+) and General (56%+) skill domains in HTB Academy.

Project: Automated Security Tooling
Developed a suite of custom security tools using Bash scripting for automated reconnaissance,
vulnerability scanning, and system notifications, enhancing efficiency in security assessments.

Project: Web Application Secure Coding
Analyzed and secured web projects by identifying and mitigating critical vulnerabilities including IDOR,
command injection, CSRF, XSS, and SQL Injection, applying practical secure encoding and validation
techniques.
Education
Ain Shams University | Cairo, Egypt
Faculty of Computer and Information Science
Junior Student (IS) | GPA: 3.3
Additional Information
Languages: Arabic (Native), English (Professional Working Proficiency)
Soft Skills: Problem-Solving, Analytical Thinking, Teamwork, Proactive Learning
Collaboration Tools: git & GitHub, Discord
Military Status: Permanently exempted (only son)

In-depth training on Linux+, Web & Network Attacks, Source Code Review, Active Directory Hacking,
and OSINT. Gained expertise in tools like Nmap, Nessus, Acunetix, Metasploit, and Burp Suite.
Master Bash Scripting: From Beginner to Advanced
Mastered Bash fundamentals and advanced techniques to build automated reconnaissance tools,
security scanners, and notification systems.
Self-Study & Advanced Knowledge
Gained comprehensive understanding of the eLearnSecurity Web Application Penetration Tester
eXtreme (eWPTX) course content, including advanced web exploitation, code review, and chained
attack techniques.
Continuously practicing and applying methodologies aligned with eWPTX in real-world labs and CTF
environments.
Certifications In Progress:
Certified Penetration Testing Specialist (CPTS)
Certified Bug Bounty Hunter (CBBH)
Practical Experience & Projects
CTF & Hands-On Practice | Hack The Box
Actively solving labs and challenges on Hack The Box and PortSwigger platforms. Demonstrated
proficiency with progress in Offensive (45%+) and General (56%+) skill domains in HTB Academy.
Project: Automated Security Tooling
Developed a suite of custom security tools using Bash scripting for automated reconnaissance,
vulnerability scanning, and system notifications, enhancing efficiency in security assessments.
Project: Web Application Secure Coding
Analyzed and secured web projects by identifying and mitigating critical vulnerabilities including IDOR,
command injection, CSRF, XSS, and SQL Injection, applying practical secure encoding and validation
techniques.
Education
Ain Shams University | Cairo, Egypt
Faculty of Computer and Information Science
Junior Student (IS) | GPA: 3.3
Additional Information
Languages: Arabic (Native), English (Professional Working Proficiency)
Soft Skills: Problem-Solving, Analytical Thinking, Teamwork, Proactive Learning
Collaboration Tools: git & GitHub, Discord
Military Status: Permanently exempted (only son)

New Cairo

09/2025

Microsoft Excel
Power BI

Development)
