∗Statistical Analysis: Applied SciPy to model Probability Density Functions and identify anomalies via Z-score
thresholding and multi-class fingerprinting.
∗Machine Learning: Built predictive models using Scikit-learn; conducted performance benchmarking using
Accuracy, Precision, and Recall metrics.
∗High-Performance Computing: Leveraged Joblib for parallelized execution of statistical distribution fitting.
Smart City IoT System - Automated People Counter | Arduino, Python
NETW503, University Project
∗Developed a real-time bi-directional people counter using an ESP32-based LilyGO T3 and dual ultrasonic sensors
with custom debounce logic for accurate direction detection.
∗Implemented a captive portal (AP mode) for persistent runtime configuration of Wi-Fi credentials, project
identity, and gateway IPs.
∗Built a multi-threaded Python Flask gateway acting as a centralized edge node, normalizing heterogeneous
sensor data and handling dynamic device provisioning via REST APIs.
∗Implemented secure JWT/Access Token management to unify telemetry streams into a real-time, scalable
ThingsBoard dashboard.
Automated Secure Remote MySQL Deployment | Bash
Giza Systems Internship
∗Built idempotent Bash automation to provision and secure MySQL 8 on RHEL 9 server and Ubuntu client,
applying secure scripting practices (traps, validation checks, etc.).
∗Implemented database creation, role-based access control, and privilege enforcement.
∗Configured remote connectivity (bind-address, firewalld, SELinux) with secure credential management.
∗Developed Ubuntu client automation with environment-based .cnf profiles and shell aliases.
Technical Skills
Languages: Java, Python, C++, SQL, Bash, Arduino, Intel 8086 Assembly
Developer Tools: Git, VS Code, Eclipse, Spyder, Arduino IDE, Docker, emu8086, ThingsBoard Cloud
Libraries: NumPy, Pandas, Matplotlib, SoundDevice, Scikit-learn, Joblib
Operating Systems: Windows, Red Hat Enterprise Linux, Ubuntu, Nobara
Other Tools: Oracle VirtualBox, Cisco Packet Tracer, Wireshark, PingPlotter
Miscellaneous: Adobe Premiere Pro, Adobe Photoshop, Blender, OBS Studio
Languages
Arabic Native
German A2
English Fluent
Japanese Conversational

Summary
Electronics and Communication Engineering graduate with strong and structured knowledge of networking gained
through CCNA coursework and CompTIA Network+ training. Possesses solid foundations in routing, switching, and
network operations, along with focused study in cybersecurity within the SOC domain. Experienced in basic security
monitoring, incident analysis, and hands-on network practice using simulation tools. Highly motivated to start a
professional career as a SOC Analyst or NOC Engineer, contributing to secure, reliable, and continuously monitored IT
environments..

Personal Project (2026)
– Designed and implemented a RAG system over 3M documents using LangChain and Pinecone, reducing hallucinations by 38% and
improving answer relevance by 45% through hybrid retrieval and grounded generation.
Image-Based Deepfake Detection | Python, PyTorch, FastAPI, ONNX
Personal Project (2026)
– Fine-tuned Xception CNN on 50,000+ frames, achieving 96% frame-level accuracy.
– Deployed via FastAPI and optimized with ONNX, applying augmentations for 12% improved robustness.
POS System | Dart, Flutter, Supabase, SQLite, PostgreSQL
Client Project (2025)
– Delivered a production-ready POS system used daily, with offline-first architecture and automated reporting.
– Integrated receipt printing, multi-language UI, and reduced checkout times by ∼70%.
Machine Learning Classification System | Python, Scikit-learn, Random Forest
Team Project Spring CW(2025)
– Collaborated in a team to design and implement a supervised ML classification pipeline on a dataset of 500K+ records, including data
cleaning, feature engineering, and train/validation splitting.
– Trained and tuned a Random Forest classifier using cross-validation and hyperparameter optimization, achieving 94% accuracy on
the validation set.
– Evaluated model performance using accuracy and confusion matrices, and compared results against baseline models to ensure
robustness and generalization.

sections.heading: Projects
sections.content:
• ​
Traffic Management System (OOP Project): Developed a simulation applying core OOP
principles (Encapsulation, Inheritance, Polymorphism, Abstraction). (Tech: C++/Java) (GitHub)
• ​
Gym Management System (Data Structures Project): Implemented a system using efficient
data structures (e.g., hash tables, lists, trees) for managing gym operations. (Tech: C++/Java)
• ​
Bank System (Structured Programming Project): Built a functional bank system using
structured programming techniques. (Tech: C++) (GitHub)
• ​
Symphony of the Stars: Developed a program translating astronomical images into audio.
(Tech: Python)
• ​
AI Obesity Prediction Model: Built an ML model to predict obesity likelihood using health data.
(Tech: Python, Scikit-learn) (GitHub)

Java Virtual Internship – NeuronetiX
August 2024
• Completed 12+ training hours and 6 hands-on projects, strengthening Java fundamentals and Object-Oriented
Programming (OOP) skills.
Red Hat
Dec. 2023 - Jan. 2025
• Red Hat System Administration I (RH124) – Linux system administration fundamentals.
• Red Hat OpenShift Development I: Introduction to Containers with Podman (DO188) – containerization and
cloud-native development.
• Red Hat Application Development I: Programming in Java EE (AD183) – enterprise application development in Java.
ISTQB Foundation Certificate in Software Testing – ESTB
Nov. 2024
• Certified in software testing fundamentals to design, execute, and evaluate reliable test processes for robust software
development.
Projects
Instapay System | Java
Jan. 2023
• Implemented these services in java : making users able to Transfer to another Instapay account, Transfer to Bank
Account, Transfer To a Mobile Wallet through a wallet providers, Paying utilities’ bills + adding many features and
contraints to the system .
• developed a RESTful API for this software. Hence, all the services and functions be exposed as a RESTful API.
• Made GUI to this system.
Othello Board Game | Python
May 2024
• Othello is a strategy board game for two players, played on an 8×8 uncheckered board. Two players compete, using 64
identical game pieces (”disks”) that are white on one side and black on the other.
• Implemented alpha-beta pruning algorithm to decide the computer moves + utility function that evaluates current game
state with respect to a given player.
• Implemented a game controller that organizes the game by switching roles between the two players, receives the user’s
move, updates the game board, and declares the “End of Game”.
• Made GUI to this game .

full-stack flight booking web portal | HTML | CSS | PHP
Dec. 2024
• Engineered and launched a fully functional, end-to-end flight booking platform that empowers both passengers and
airlines with a seamless digital experience.
• Engineered backend services in PHP to manage user authentication, flight operations, and real-time flight data updates
and personalized content delivery.
• Integrated a MySQL relational database for real-time flight data, booking records, and secure passenger management.
• Designed for scalability and easy deployment—laying the groundwork for future enhancements and API integration.
Gigs Application | Java Spring Boot | Flutter | Docker
July 2025
• Designed and developed a mobile and web platform to structure Egypt’s informal gig economy, enabling users to post
tasks (deliveries, events, errands) and workers (students, freelancers) to apply for them.
• Implemented core services: task posting and bidding, escrow-based payments, user reviews, real-time messaging, and
dispute resolution.
• Built backend using Java Spring Boot with microservices architecture, each service running in Docker and managing its
own database.
• Integrated Keycloak for authentication and role-based access control, Firebase for notifications and live updates, and
Cloudinary for media storage.
• Developed mobile frontend with Flutter, ensuring a scalable, secure, and user-friendly experience.

• Data Structures

• Artificial Intelligence
• Red Hat Linux

• Operating Systems
• Problem Solving

Cisco Cybersecurity Program – NTI (National Telecommunication Institute)
October 2024 – May 2025

- Training in CCNA and Cisco CyberOps.

.

- Good at network configuration and troubleshooting (routing, switching, VLANs, ACLs).

- Basic use of SIEM tools and packet analysis
- Attention to detail
- Active listening
- Team collaboration

Rania Mohamed Fathy
01280919551- 01148007519
Rania.radwan1512@gmail.com
Zahraa El-Maadi

Overview
Fresh graduate from RTU Program at Raya IT (DEM Track) with hands-on experience in ITOM & ITSM.
Worked on incident management, SLA monitoring, infrastructure monitoring, and CMDB updates using
OpenText tools (SMAX, SiteScope, UCMDB). Familiar with ITIL principles, VMware environments, and basic
software testing concepts. Fast learner with strong attention to detail.

Work Experience
Successfully Completed RTU Program in Raya IT (ITOM / ITSM) ( June 2025 – January 2026 )
- Completed intensive training in ITSM & ITOM, covering ITIL fundamentals, service lifecycle, and soft skills (Inside-
Out(.
- Installed and worked with OpenText tools (SMAX, SiteScope, UCMDB)
- Performed infrastructure monitoring using SiteScope (ping, network availability, disk usage)
- Supported incident handling and ticket management using SMAX
- Conducted CI validation during shadowing at Housing & Development Bank, validating IPs against hostnames and VM
names
- Built CI relationships and mappings within UCMDB to identify related infrastructure components
- Worked with VMware to configure and prepare virtualized environments
- Hands-on experience with Linux (CentOS, Ubuntu) and Windows Server
Gained exposure to IAM (Ivanti), Splunk, Patch Management, and Testing SDLC concepts

IT Help Desk in Majid El – Futtaim ( Head Office Department ) (May 2024 – May 2025)
- Respond to help disk tickets and provide support via phone , email
- Install, configure and maintain computer system
- Document issues and resolutions in help disk ticketing system
- Provide training and support to users on new application and technology

Education
Graduated From Business information Systems , Helwan University (2019 – 2023)
Degree : Good

Courses and Certificates
RTU Program ( Digital Enterprise Management ) Track .
Soft-Skills ( Inside-Out ).
Software Testing Diploma ( EraaSoft ).
Front-End ( Codization ).

Technical Skills
•
ITSM / ITOM: SMAX, SiteScope, UCMDB, ITIL Fundamentals
•
Monitoring & Infrastructure: VMware, Linux (CentOS, Ubuntu), Windows Server
•
Testing: Test Planning, Functional Testing, API Testing (Postman), SQL Basics, ISTQB FL Concepts

•
Tools: Jira, Postman
•
Programming Basics: Python, JavaScript, HTML, CSS
•
Methodologies: Agile, SDLC, STLC

Summer Training Programs
Financial Inclusion - CIB (4 Weeks - 2021 )
Rowad Program - Banque Misr ( 4 Weeks - 2022 )
Entrepreneurship - CIB ( 4 Weeks - 2022 )
Statistical Data Analysis - ( City of Scientific Research and Technology Applications ) ( Four Weeks 2022 )

Activities
Volunteer in Resala Charity Since 2015 in [ Sales – Marketing – then promoted to HR Marketing
Team ] Karate Player ( 2006 – 2022 ) – Reached the Black Belt (2014)

Language : English: Intermediate (B2)

full_text:
Data Analyst
ABDALLAH MUHAMMAD
Cairo, Egypt abdallahhmuhammad@gmail.com
+0201055001660
In/profile
Portfolio

CAREER OBJECTIVE
Detail-oriented Data Analyst with expertise in SQL, Python, Power BI, and Excel, seeking to leverage statistical knowledge and technical skills to
transform data into actionable business insights. Driven to translate complex datasets into clear, actionable recommendations that enable
informed decision-making and measurable business impact.

TECHNICAL SKILLS
•
MySQL
•
Microsoft Excel (Pivot Tables, Power Query, Power Pivot)
•
Microsoft Power BI
•
Python (Pandas, NumPy, Matplotlib, Seaborn)
•
Git/GitHub

SOFT SKILLS
•
Detail-oriented
•
Teamwork & collaboration
•
Problem-solving
•
Decision-making
•
Research skills
•
Critical thinking

EDUCATION
BACHELOR OF SCIENCE | Helwan University

October 2020 – August 2024
Major: Statistics and Computer Science
Grade: Good

DATA SCIENCE INTERNSHIP | ALX
May 2023 – August 2024, Cairo, Egypt (Hybrid)
•
Performed data cleaning and preprocessing using SQL and Python to ensure data quality and accuracy.
•
Created interactive dashboards and reports in Microsoft Power BI and Excel to visualize key trends and communicate insights to
stakeholders.
•
Developed predictive machine learning models using Python's scikit-learn library and delivered data-driven solutions to support business
decision-making.

EXPERIENCE
International Technical Advisor | VOIS (Full-Time)
December 2024 – August 2025, Cairo, Egypt (Hybrid)
•
Provided technical support for Vodafone UK's home broadband customers through calls and tickets.
•
Diagnosed and resolved connectivity issues, coordinated engineer appointments, and conducted remote video assessments to
troubleshoot customer problems.
•
Delivered customer-focused solutions to ensure service quality and customer satisfaction.

PROJECTS
Digital Marketing Analytics in Power BI – Personal Project
Project Link
•
Designed and built a comprehensive Power BI dashboard analyzing digital marketing data, utilizing star schema data modeling with 3
core tables and a Calendar table to enable time intelligence analysis.
•
Developed DAX measures including Click-Through Rate, Cost per Acquisition, Conversion Rate, and Month-over-Month growth metrics to
track campaign performance trends and identify optimization opportunities.
•
Created an interactive 3-page dashboard with bookmarks, field parameters, and Top N filters to analyze conversions across multiple
dimensions like platform, demographics, time periods.

HR Analytics – Capstone Project
Project Link
•
Built end-to-end HR analytics solution analyzing employee attrition patterns using Power BI, Power Query, and DAX to deliver data-
driven workforce insights.
•
Connected relational data model and created 15+ custom DAX measures to track KPIs including attrition rates, tenure analysis, and
performance metrics across 1,470 employees.
•
Conducted exploratory data analysis identifying key retention risks: new hires, frequent travelers, and specific department-role
combinations.
•
Developed interactive 4-page dashboard with advanced features including drill-throughs, dynamic filtering, and cross-page navigation.

Customer Churn Analysis – Capstone Project
Project Link
•
Analyzed customer records using Excel PivotTables and advanced formulas to identify churn patterns and drivers.
•
Built interactive dashboard with KPIs and visualizations revealing churn rate, with California showing critical churn.
•
Identified seniors as highest-risk demographic and delivered targeted retention recommendations based on support quality insights.

LANGUAGES
•
Arabic ( Native )
•
English ( Professional )
•
Spanish ( Elementary )

Nasr City - Cairo

linkedin.com/in/salma-hesham-marei
Profile
Dedicated Computer Engineering student at Ain Shams University with a strong academic background in
programming and software engineering fundamentals. Seeking opportunities to gain practical experience, enhance
technical skills, and contribute to team-based engineering projects. Strong analytical thinking and ability to learn
quickly.
Education
09/2023 – 07/2027
Cairo, Egypt
Bachelor of Computer and Systems Engineering
Faculty of Engineering, Ain Shams University
Experience & Projects
12/2025
Dental Clinic Management System - Desktop Application
Java, JavaFX
• Designed and implemented the graphical user interface (GUI) using JavaFX
• Connected the backend logic to the GUI, enabling real-time data interaction and user-
driven operations.
• Performed testing and debugging to ensure system functionality and data integrity.
02/2025 – 05/2025
Electric Vehicle Charging Startup – Business Model Case Study
ExxonMobil - MECA Academy
• Developed a comprehensive business model for a technology startup in the Electric
Vehicle (EV) charging sector.
• Analyzed the Egyptian market and proposed an innovative EV charging solution.
• Contributed to the marketing strategy, including value proposition, target customers,
and market positioning.
12/2024
Advanced circuit analyzer with C++
Computer Programming course project
• Developed a C++ application that calculates the total resistance of an electrical circuit.
• Parsed a user-provided string description to analyze circuit configuration.
• Applied problem-solving and algorithmic thinking to ensure accurate calculations.
12/2024
Traffic light controller design and implementation
Logic Design course project (Team Project)
• Designed and simulated a traffic light controller circuit using Multisim.
• Implemented the circuit on a breadboard using decade counters, 555 timer, decoders,
7-segment displays, and push buttons.
07/2025 – 08/2025
Microcontroller-Based Systems Training – NTI & ITIDA | 2025
Completed 120-hour embedded systems program covering C/​Embedded C, AVR, GPIO,
ADC, timers, interrupts, and USART. Designed and simulated a Smart Control System
using ATmega32 with UART LED/​motor control, ADC temperature monitoring,
automatic door, and LCD display using Proteus. Applied modular MCAL/​HAL
architecture and developed teamwork, problem-solving, and professional freelancing
skills.

full_text:
Sayed Ahmed Zedan

Network Engineer

sayedzedan8658@gmail.com | +(20) 1143338658 | Tanta, Egypt (Willing to Relocate)

GitHub: github.com/SayedZedan | LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/sayed-zedan-72218623a/

Summary

Network Engineer with experience in network configuration, administration, and optimization
Proficient in cloud networking (AWS VPC, EC2), Windows Server administration, and Cisco
protocols from CCNA training. Focused on designing and maintaining network infrastructures for
connectivity and performance.

.

Education

Bachelor’s degree in communications and Electronics Engineering Sep 2019 – Aug 2024

Faculty of Engineering, Tanta University.

Graduation Project

Design of Microstrip Patch Antenna For 5G Communication

Grade: Excellent

Experience

Technical Military Service (IT-related Unit) – Egyptian Armed Forces, Electronic Warfare

• Contributing to the support and security of IT infrastructure. Gained hands-on experience in
networking and signal analysis within a sensitive military environment. Mar 2025 – Mar 2026

BARQ Academy Oct 2024 – Nov2024

• Completed hands-on training in network fundamentals, covering core concepts in networking
protocols, configuration, and administration.

Certifications

Oracle Cloud Infrastructure 2025 Certified Multicloud Architect Professional

IBM Cybersecurity Analyst Professional Certificate
Oracle Certified Foundations Associate

Fortinet Certified Associate in Cybersecurity

& Internships

Scholarships

Digital Egypt Pioneers Program Apr2024 – Oct 2024

Infrastructure and security AWS Cloud Solution Admin & Architect.

National Telecommunication Institute (NTI) Sep 2024

Windows Server Administrations

Education for employment EFE-Egypt Sep 2024

Cybersecurity Track internship

National Telecommunication Institute (NTI) 120 hours Sep 2022

Cisco Certified Network Associate (CCNA) Training

Technical Skills

Network Administration: Active Directory Management | Windows Server Administration | MCSA |
Cisco Routing & Switching (CCNA) | VLAN Configuration | Subnetting & IP Addressing.

IP Management: Subnetting (IPv4/IPv6), CIDR, VLSM, IP address allocation, DHCP server setup,
DNS resolution.

Cloud Platform: Virtual Private Cloud (VPC) | Identity and Access Management | Amazon
Elastic Compute Cloud (EC2)

Soft Skills

Confidentiality | Team Collaboration | Attention to Detail | Multitasking | Communication Skills

Objective
I am Sayed Atwh, a third-years student at the Faculty of Computers and Information, Beni Suef University,
Specializing in Cloud Computing and DevOps , with a strong focus on building a professional career in this
Filed. I have hands-on experience with Cloud platforms such as AWS, automation, and implementing CI/CD
Pipelines, emphasizing scalable and resilient system design. Highly passionate about continuous learning and
Skill development, I am seeking internship opportunities or practical project to contribute effectively and
Make a positive impact.

Experience

National Telecommunication Institute (NTI) –OnlineTraining
•
Completed CCNA (Cisco Certified Network Associate) training covering networking fundamentals, routing, switching,
and troubleshooting.
•
Trained as a Linux Administrator, working with Linux command line, user management, permissions, services, and
system monitoring.
•
Completed AWS Cloud Services Management and Operations training, including EC2, S3, IAM, networking, and cloud
operations concepts.( Offline)
AWS Cloud Trainee (NTI) Summer Training
•
Completed AWS Cloud Practitioner training covering core AWS services, cloud concepts, security, and pricing.
•
Studied AWS Solutions Architect fundamentals, focusing on designing scalable, secure, and highly available cloud
architectures.
Multi-Cloud & DevOps Engineer Trainee (Junior Level)
Dolfined
•
Currently training on Multi-Cloud environments (AWS & Azure).
•
Learning DevOps fundamentals, CI/CD concepts, containerization, and cloud automation.
•
Gaining hands-on experience with cloud infrastructure and deployment workflows.

Education
Beni-Suef University,Faculty of Computers and Information
Bachelor of Computer Science (CS) | Expected Graduation: 2027

admin1& admin2

CI/CD
AWS
Jenkins

Prometheus & Grafana
Ansible & Terraform
Version Control System
Scripting Language
Git & GitHub
Bash , Python

Projects
Flask Web Application Deployment (Docker) (GitHub link)
• Deployed a Python Flask web application using Docker and Docker Compose.
• Ensured consistent, reproducible deployments across Linux environments.
• Applied containerization best practices for application delivery.
Static Website Deployment using NGINX & Docker (GitHub link)
• Deployed a static HTML/CSS website using NGINX inside Docker containers.
• Created Dockerfiles and validated deployment on cloud infrastructure.
• Gained hands-on experience with web server configuration and containers.
AWS S3 Automated Backup System (GitHub link)
• Implemented automated backup solutions using Bash scripting and AWS CLI.
• Configured IAM roles and scheduled backups using cron jobs.
• Improved data reliability through cloud-based storage automation.
AWS Hub-and-Spoke Network Architecture using Transit Gateway (GitHub link)
• Designed and implemented a multi-VPC hub-and-spoke architecture using AWS Transit Gateway.
• Connected multiple VPCs with centralized routing and traffic management.
• Configured public and private subnets with Internet Gateway and route tables.
• Applied AWS networking and security best practices.

Certificates
• AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner (CLF-C02) View Certificate Jan 2026

• Arabic: Native
• English: Fluent (Reading, Writing, Speaking)

full_text:
SHAHD ABDELKHALEK
Cairo, Egypt | +20 1155300503 | shahdwael844@gmail.com
LinkedIn | GitHub
PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
Computer Science and Engineering student with hands-on experience in Machine Learning, Optimization,
and Data Analytics. Experienced in research projects in Germany, developing pipelines and benchmarking AI
models, and creating practical tools for complex data analysis. Curious, analytical, and collaborative, I enjoy
turning data into actionable insights while continuously learning and improving.
TECHNICAL SKILLS
• Languages: Python (Scikit-learn, PyTorch, Pandas), SQL, Cypher (Neo4j), Java, C++, MongoDB.
• AI & Research: Machine Learning, NLP, LLMs (Gemini, Llama), Reinforcement Learning, U-Net.
• Tools: OCI (Oracle Cloud), Git, Docker, Cellpose-SAM, StarDist, Spacy, Neo4j Graph Data Science.
• Optimization: Metaheuristics (GA, ACO, SA), Vehicle Routing (PDPTW), Statistical Validation.
EDUCATION
German University in Cairo (GUC)
Sep 2021 – Jun 2026
B.Sc. in Computer Science and Engineering
GPA: 1.8 (German Scale)
• Pre-Master’s Electives: Machine Learning, Optimization Techniques, NLP, Reinforcement Learning
(RLOC), HCI.
• Academic Seminar: Brain Tumor MRI Segmentation using Deep Learning (U-Net architectures).
HTW Berlin (Hochschule für Technik und Wirtschaft)
Mar 2025 – Jul 2025
Research Intern / Bachelor Thesis
Grade: A
• Developed a Python pipeline evaluating Cellpose-SAM and StarDist for cell segmentation.
• Performed statistical validation using IoU, Dice, and Precision-Recall metrics with memory profiling.
PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE
Think-3DDD
Berlin, Germany
Software Developer Intern
May 2025 – Dec 2025
• Integrated frontend features with backend APIs to ensure real-time data accuracy and platform scalability.
• Optimized data flow between client-side components and server-side databases.
Orange Business
Cairo, Egypt
Network & Cloud Intern
Jul 2024 – Sep 2024
• Monitored enterprise cloud systems to maintain SLA compliance and documented reliability workflows.
AI & RESEARCH PROJECTS
Graph-RAG AI Assistant (FPL Trivia & Recommender)
GitHub
• Architected a RAG system using Neo4j Knowledge Graphs and LLMs (Gemini, Llama).
• Engineered a hybrid retrieval layer combining Cypher queries with semantic vector search.
• Implemented intent classification and NER pipelines using Spacy and LLM-based reasoning.
Logistics Optimization Analysis (PDPTW)
• Authored a comparative analysis of metaheuristics (GA, ACO, SA, EGTOA) for vehicle routing.
• Evaluated performance on Li & Lim benchmark instances across clustered and random topologies.
LEADERSHIP & ACHIEVEMENTS
• Head of Data Analytics (IEEE GUC): Led 15+ members to deliver Python & Analytics workshops.
• 3rd Place: Henkel ThinkTech Hackathon (2025).
• Certification: Oracle Cloud Infrastructure Data Science Professional (2025)
• Volunteering: Egyptian Food Bank; Athar GUC
• Event Ushering: IEEE WIE ILS 2024; Cairo Runners 2024 & 2026; Art Cairo 2025; Something Else
Exhibition 2023

full_text:
YASMINE MOHAMED RAMADAN
+20 106 612 5976 | Cairo, Egypt
yassminramadan111@gmail.com | LinkedIn | GitHub

CAREER SUMMARY
Software Developer with experience in full-stack application development, backend systems, and data workflows. Skilled in designing
RESTful APIs, implementing scalable architectures, and working with relational databases. Strong foundation in data structures,
algorithms, and object-oriented programming. Experienced in integrating AI-driven features into real-world applications.
EDUCATION AND CERTIFICATION
Bachelor of Computer and Information Sciences| Ain Shams University, Cairo
2022-2026
Major: Computer Science | CGPA: 3.24 (Very Good)
SQL (Basic) Certification | HackerRank 07/2025
TECHNICAL SKILLS
Frontend: HTML, CSS, JavaScript (ES6+), Bootstrap , React ,Next.js
Backend: C#, ASP.NET Core MVC, Web API, LINQ
Languages: C++, Java, Python, TypeScript
Databases: SQL Server, Oracle SQL
Tools: Git, GitHub, Visual Studio,Visual studio code
Concepts: OOP, REST APIs, Data Structures, Machine Learning

WORK EXPERIENCE
Full Stack .NET Development Program | Digital Egypt Pioneers Initiative 07/2025 – 12/2025
• Completed an intensive 6-month program covering frontend, backend, databases, and deployment.
• Gained hands-on experience building multiple full-stack projects with C#, ASP.NET Core, Web API, SQL Server, and React.

.NET Development Intern (MVC) | Information Technology Institute (ITI)
10/2025
• Completed intensive full-stack .NET training covering C#, ASP.NET Core MVC, and SQL Server.
• Built integrated front-end and back-end applications following MVC architecture.
• Developed database-driven applications with authentication and CRUD functionality.

Data Engineer Intern | Ejada, Heliopolis
7/2025- 8/2025
• Collaborated on ETL workflows and optimized SQL queries for enterprise datasets.
• Performed data cleansing and supported data warehousing initiatives.
• Gained exposure to enterprise-scale data architecture and database performance tuning.

PROJECT EXPERIENCE

Gym Management System | ASP.NET Core, React, JWT
• Developed a secure full-stack platform with role-based authentication and subscription management.
• Designed scalable REST APIs using clean architecture principles.
• Integrated responsive React frontend with backend services.
Medical Tourism Website | Full Stack .NET, React, AI
• Built AI-powered doctor verification system and secure authentication workflows.
• Implemented real-time appointment management and responsive UI design.
University Management System | ASP.NET Core MVC, EF Core, SQL Server •
Developed role-based authentication using Identity.

• Implemented secure CRUD operations for departments, courses, and students.

Banking Analytics System | Informatica, Oracle SQL
• Designed ETL workflows integrating 13+ relational tables.
• Developed data models for loan tracking and customer insights.
Map Routing Application | C#, WinForms, Graph Algorithms
• Implemented modified Dijkstra’s algorithm for shortest path calculation.
• Built interactive route visualization interface.
Gym Management System (Console) | Java, OOP
• Developed console-based system utilizing inheritance, encapsulation, and polymorphism
Sentiment Analysis (NLP Project) | Python, Scikit-learn
• Built a sentiment classification model using text preprocessing, tokenization, and TF-IDF feature extraction.
• Trained and evaluated machine learning classifiers to predict text sentiment with strong performance metrics.
• Implemented end-to-end ML pipeline from data cleaning to model evaluation. Video Game Sales Prediction (ML Project) |
Python, Pandas, Scikit-learn
• Trained regression and classification models on Steam data to predict game sales.
• Performed feature engineering and evaluated model performance.

Youssef Mahmoud Flutter developer
youssef.mahmoud51098@gmail.com
Giza, Egypt
LinkedIn
01000799459
GitHub
Portfolio
Summary
Flutter developer dedicated to building high-performance mobile applications that deliver seamless user experiences.
Passionate about solving real-world problems through clean code, continuous learning, and impactful solutions.
Professional Experience
Go Play Company
Flutter Developer (Part-Time, Remote)
• I developed a cross-platform sports management application using Flutter and Clean
Architecture, ensuring smooth performance and a high-quality user experience
10/2025 – Present
Saudi Arabian
• I integrated RESTful APIs to display real-time tournament data (results, standings,
statistics) and collaborated with multidisciplinary teams using Git
• I contributed to bug fixes, code reviews, and feature enhancements for the app's launch on
the Google Play Store.
Projects
Go Play – Cross-Platform Sports Management App
Go Play is a Flutter-based cross-platform mobile application (Android & iOS) designed to
empower sports organizers and team owners to create and manage tournaments, leagues,
and teams efficiently. The app allows users to schedule matches, track results, view
standings, and access real-time statistics, providing a complete sports management solution.
Developed using Clean Architecture and integrated with RESTful APIs, Go Play ensures
scalable, maintainable, and high-performance code. It features a smooth, intuitive user
experience across platforms and is available on Google Play
10/2025 – Present
ITI Learning Platform – AI-Powered Educational Management System
A Flutter-based educational system built with Clean Architecture, MVVM, and BLoC.
Features role-based dashboards (Student/Admin/Super Admin), AI-powered Q&A (Gemini
AI), track-based courses, and resource management. Includes multilingual support (EN/AR
with RTL), real-time Firestore updates, and Firebase Cloud Messaging for notifications.
Demonstrates skills in scalable architecture, AI integration, and full-stack Flutter with
Firebase.
07/2025 – 08/2025

Pursuing a Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science
Fayoum University
10/2022 – 06/2026
Fayoum, Egypt

sections.heading: Projects
sections.content:
Go Play – Cross-Platform Sports Management App
Go Play is a Flutter-based cross-platform mobile application (Android & iOS) designed to
empower sports organizers and team owners to create and manage tournaments, leagues,
and teams efficiently. The app allows users to schedule matches, track results, view
standings, and access real-time statistics, providing a complete sports management solution.
Developed using Clean Architecture and integrated with RESTful APIs, Go Play ensures
scalable, maintainable, and high-performance code. It features a smooth, intuitive user
experience across platforms and is available on Google Play
10/2025 – Present
ITI Learning Platform – AI-Powered Educational Management System
A Flutter-based educational system built with Clean Architecture, MVVM, and BLoC.
Features role-based dashboards (Student/Admin/Super Admin), AI-powered Q&A (Gemini
AI), track-based courses, and resource management. Includes multilingual support (EN/AR
with RTL), real-time Firestore updates, and Firebase Cloud Messaging for notifications.
Demonstrates skills in scalable architecture, AI integration, and full-stack Flutter with
Firebase.
07/2025 – 08/2025

IT Engineer

Ó +20 103 476 3706 |  Cairo, Egypt | Military Service Status: Postponed
SUMMARY
Electronics & Communications Engineering graduate with hands-on experience in Linux, networking, and cloud technologies (AWS).
Skilled in system administration, version control (Git/GitHub), and IT workflow automation. Experienced with monitoring tools
(Prometheus, Grafana) and supporting IT infrastructure. Passionate about learning, troubleshooting, and optimizing systems to improve
performance and reliability in professional IT environments.
EDUCATION
Higher Technological Institute
Alsharqia, Egypt
Bachelor of Engineering, Communications & Electronics Department
Oct. 2020 – Jan. 2026
• GPA 2.75 / 4.0 (Good).
• Graduation Project Grade (A+)
EXPERIENCE
Digital Egypt Pioneers Initiative (DEPI)
Jun. 2025 – Dec. 2025
DevOps Track Trainee - Ministry of Communications and Information Technology
Online
• Gained hands-on experience in Linux, Bash scripting, Git, and Python while automating cloud infrastructure with Docker,
Kubernetes, Helm, AWS, Terraform, and Ansible.
• Developed full-stack observability solutions with Prometheus and Grafana to ensure 99.9% system reliability through real-time
performance visualization.
• Learned to optimize CI/CD workflows by integrating Jenkins with source control for automated builds and seamless deployments
to EKS.
PROJECTS
Graduation Project: Cloud-Native Node.js App with IaC & CI/CD and Observability ®
Jun. 2026
• Built scalable AWS EKS infrastructure using Terraform modules for reusable environment provisioning.
• Designed GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline with AWS authentication and Git SHA-based image tagging for traceable deployments.
• Implemented HPA and Cluster Autoscaler to optimize resource usage under traffic fluctuations.
• Set up Prometheus & Grafana for centralized monitoring and real-time application observability.
Cloud-Native EKS Infrastructure & CI/CD Pipeline ®
Dec. 2025
• Provisioned AWS EKS cluster with private Nexus registry using Terraform and Ansible for high availability and secure image
management.
• Built a Jenkins CI/CD pipeline with automated EKS deployments, HPA, and Cluster Autoscaler to optimize resource usage and
eliminate manual steps.
PC Controller ® | C++
Mar. 2025
• Developed a remote control server utilizing TCP socket programming on Linux to execute administrative commands.
Python Alexa Simulation ® | Python
Aug. 2024
• Developed a voice assistant featuring speech recognition, automated application control, and web search integration.
TECHNICAL SKILLS
• Cloud & Infrastructure: AWS, Terraform (IaC), Ansible (Configuration Management)
• Containers & Orchestration: Docker, Kubernetes, Helm
• CI/CD & Automation: GitHub Actions, Jenkins, Git, CI/CD Pipelines
• Observability & Monitoring: Prometheus and Grafana
• Languages & Scripting: Python, Bash Scripting, Linux Command Line, C/C++
• Networking: Computer networking fundamentals, TCP/IP, UDP, DNS, SSH, Socket Programming, Wireshark
• Databases: PostgreSql
SOFT SKILLS
• Problem Solving & Critical Thinking

• Ownership & Accountability
• Team Collaboration & Communication
• Adaptability & Fast Learning
• Time Management & Prioritization
• Attention to Detail
COURSES
• Embedded Linux by pn-junction
• Embedded Systems by IMT
LANGUAGES
• Arabic (Native)
• English (Professional working proficiency)

PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
Software Engineer specializing in Full-Stack JavaScript development with strong expertise in React.js,
Node.js, and modern web technologies. Experienced in building scalable web applications, RESTful APIs,
and secure authentication systems using JWT. Skilled in responsive UI development, performance
optimization, and Agile teamwork. Proven ability to lead development projects and deliver production-ready
solutions.
TECHNICAL SKILLS

Design, API Integration

University Communication Platform

• Led a team to develop a university communication system connecting students and staff.

• Improved communication workflow efficiency through centralized data management.
Technologies: React.js, Java, Spring Boot, MySQL, JWT

Full-Stack Developer

Full-Stack Developer
• Developed a full MERN e-commerce platform with authentication and admin dashboard.
• Implemented JWT authentication and role-based authorization.
• Built reusable React components improving UI performance and maintainability.
• Designed scalable REST APIs using Express.js and MongoDB.
Technologies: MongoDB, Express.js, React.js, Node.js

Full-Stack Developer
• Built an online marketplace for buying and selling used books.

Technologies: MERN Stack
